function v50.ToppleTree(_, p205, p206)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_3, (copy) v_u_8, (copy) v_u_4
	local v207 = p206 or {}
	local v208 = v207.duration or 1.7
	local v209 = v207.easing or Enum.EasingStyle.Cubic
	local v210 = v207.angleDeg or -95
	local v211 = v207.axis or "Z"
	if p205 and p205:IsA("Model") then
		v_u_3:RemoveTag(p205, "Tree")
		local v212 = p205:FindFirstChild("Origin") or p205.PrimaryPart
		if v212 and v212:IsA("BasePart") then
			local v213 = p205:GetDescendants()
			local v214 = {}
			local v215 = {}
			local v_u_216 = {}
			local v217 = {}
			for v218 = 1, #v213 do
				local v219 = v213[v218]
				if v219:IsA("BasePart") then
					v214[#v214 + 1] = v219
					local v220 = v219.Name
					local v221 = tonumber(v220)
					if v221 ~= nil then
						v215[#v215 + 1] = v219
						v_u_216[v219] = v221
					end
				elseif v219:IsA("WeldConstraint") then
					v217[#v217 + 1] = v219
				end
			end
			if #v215 == 0 then
				warn("ToppleTree: no numbered parts found")
			else
				table.sort(v215, function(p222, p223)
					-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_216
					local v224 = v_u_216[p222]
					local v225 = v_u_216[p223]
					if v224 == v225 then
						return p222.Name < p223.Name
					else
						return v224 < v225
					end
				end)
				local v226 = p205:GetAttribute("BreakPoint")
				local v227
				if typeof(v226) == "number" then
					local v228 = math.floor(v226)
					local v229 = #v215
					v227 = math.clamp(v228, 1, v229)
				else
					v227 = 1
				end
				local v230 = v215[v227]
				local v231 = {}
				for v232 = 1, #v215 do
					local v233 = v215[v232]
					if v233:GetAttribute("WindShake") then
						v_u_3:RemoveTag(v233, "WindShake")
					end
					v231[v233] = v232
				end
				local v234 = v230.Size.Y * 0.5
				if v234 > 0.05 then
					local v235 = v230.CFrame
					local v236 = v230.Size
					local v237 = v230:Clone()
					local v238 = v227 - 0.1
					v237.Name = tostring(v238)
					local v239 = v236.X
					local v240 = v236.Z
					v237.Size = Vector3.new(v239, v234, v240)
					v237.CFrame = v235 * CFrame.new(0, -v234 / 2, 0)
					for _, v241 in ipairs(v237:GetDescendants()) do
						if v241:IsA("WeldConstraint") then
							v241:Destroy()
						end
					end
					v237.Parent = p205
					local v242 = v230:Clone()
					local v243 = v227 + 0.1
					v242.Name = tostring(v243)
					local v244 = v236.X
					local v245 = v236.Z
					v242.Size = Vector3.new(v244, v234, v245)
					v242.CFrame = v235 * CFrame.new(0, v234 / 2, 0)
					for _, v246 in ipairs(v242:GetDescendants()) do
						if v246:IsA("WeldConstraint") then
							v246:Destroy()
						end
					end
					v242.Parent = p205
					local v247 = false
					for v248 = 1, #v217 do
						local v249 = v217[v248]
						if v249.Part0 == v230 or v249.Part1 == v230 then
							local v250 = v249.Part0 == v230 and v249.Part1 or v249.Part0
							local v251 = v250 == v212
							if not v251 then
								local v252 = v231[v250]
								v251 = v252 ~= nil and v252 < v227
							end
							if v251 then
								v247 = true
								if v249.Part0 == v230 then
									v249.Part0 = v237
								else
									v249.Part1 = v237
								end
								if v249.Parent == v230 then
									v249.Parent = v237
								end
							else
								if v249.Part0 == v230 then
									v249.Part0 = v242
								else
									v249.Part1 = v242
								end
								if v249.Parent == v230 then
									v249.Parent = v242
								end
							end
						end
					end
					if not v247 then
						local v253 = Instance.new("WeldConstraint")
						v253.Name = "Weld_" .. v237.Name .. "_to_" .. v212.Name
						v253.Part0 = v237
						v253.Part1 = v212
						v253.Parent = v237
					end
					v230:Destroy()
					for v254 = 1, #v214 do
						local v255 = v214[v254]
						if v255 ~= v230 and v255.Parent then
							v255.Anchored = v255.Name == v_u_8
							v255.CanCollide = false
						end
					end
					v237.Anchored = true
					v242.Anchored = true
					v237.CanCollide = true
					v242.CanCollide = false
					local v256 = v242.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, -v242.Size.Y / 2, 0)
					local v257 = v256:ToObjectSpace(v242.CFrame)
					local v258
					if v211 == "X" then
						local v259 = CFrame.Angles
						local v260 = -v210
						v258 = v259(math.rad(v260), 0, 0)
					elseif v211 == "Y" then
						v258 = CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(v210), 0)
					else
						v258 = CFrame.Angles(0, 0, (math.rad(v210)))
					end
					local v261 = {
						["CFrame"] = v256 * v258 * v257
					}
					local v262 = v_u_4:Create(v242, TweenInfo.new(v208, v209, Enum.EasingDirection.In), v261)
					v262:Play()
					return v262, v242, v237
				end
				warn("ToppleTree: chosen segment too small to split")
			end
		else
			warn("ToppleTree: no Origin or PrimaryPart to anchor stump")
			return
		end
	else
		warn("ToppleTree: model required")
		return
	end
end
return v50

function v_u_17._updateOccupants(p111, p112, p113)

			if not v115.entered then
				v115.entered = {}
			end

			table.insert(v121, v120)
		end
	end
	return v115
end

end

function v_u_17._partTouchedZone(p_u_137, p_u_138)

	local v_u_139 = p_u_137.trackingTouchedTriggers.part
	if not v_u_139[p_u_138] then
		local v_u_140 = 0
		local v_u_141 = false
		local v_u_142 = p_u_138.Position
		local v_u_143 = os.clock()
		local v_u_144 = p_u_137.janitor:add(v_u_7.new(), "destroy")
		v_u_139[p_u_138] = v_u_144
		if not ({
			["Seat"] = true,
			["VehicleSeat"] = true
		})[p_u_138.ClassName] and ({
			["HumanoidRootPart"] = true
		})[p_u_138.Name] then

function v_u_17._onItemCallback(p_u_235, p236, p237, p_u_238, p_u_239)

		v240 = {}

		p_u_239()

		v_u_241 = p_u_235[p236]:Connect(function(p242)
			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_241, (copy) p_u_238, (copy) p_u_239, (copy) p_u_235

				v_u_241:Disconnect()

					p_u_235.itemsToUntrack[p_u_238] = nil
					p_u_235:untrackItem(p_u_238)
				end
			end
		end)
	end
end

	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_3, (ref) v_u_11, (ref) v_u_13, (ref) v_u_12, (ref) v_u_14, (copy) v_u_4

			v125 = v130.Size

		end
	end

		return {}
	end

	local v132 = p120 and v_u_12 or v_u_14
	local v133 = OverlapParams.new()
	v133.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Whitelist
	v133.MaxParts = #v131
	v133.FilterDescendantsInstances = v131

		end
	end

local function v_u_8(p4)

	local v5 = 0

		end

end
return {
	["Appraise"] = function(_, p9, p10, p11, p12)
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_8
		local v13 = v_u_2[p9].species[p10].baseValue
		local v14 = math.clamp(p11, 0.7, 4)
		local v15 = v_u_8(p12)
		local v16 = v14 ^ 2.35
		local v17 = v14 - 1
		local v18 = math.max(0, v17) ^ 2 * 0.08 + 2
		local v19 = v13 * v16 * v18 * v15
		if v19 < 100 then
			local v20 = v19 / 1 + 0.5
			return math.floor(v20) * 1
		elseif v19 < 1000 then
			local v21 = v19 / 5 + 0.5
			return math.floor(v21) * 5
		elseif v19 < 10000 then
			local v22 = v19 / 10 + 0.5
			return math.floor(v22) * 10
		else
			local v23 = v19 / 50 + 0.5
			return math.floor(v23) * 50
		end
	end

	if v_u_21.root and v_u_21.driverSeat then
		local v24 = v_u_21.root:FindFirstChild("SuspensionFL")
		if v24 and v24:FindFirstChild("Wheel") then

			v_u_21.driverSeat.MaxSpeed = v_u_21.VehicleParameters.MaxSpeed * v25
		end
	end
	v_u_21._ancestryConn = p_u_19.AncestryChanged:Connect(function()
		-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_19, (copy) v_u_21
		if not p_u_19:IsDescendantOf(game) then
			v_u_21:Destroy()
		end
	end)
	return v_u_21
end
function v_u_2._gravityAdjust(p26)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	local v27 = v_u_1.Gravity / 196.2
	local v28 = math.sqrt(v27)
	p26._actualDrivingTorque = p26.VehicleParameters.DrivingTorque * v27
	p26._actualBrakingTorque = p26.VehicleParameters.BrakingTorque * v27
	p26._actualStrutStiffFront = p26.VehicleParameters.StrutSpringStiffnessFront * v27 * 1.15
	p26._actualStrutDampFront = p26.VehicleParameters.StrutSpringDampingFront * v28 * 1.12
	p26._actualStrutStiffRear = p26.VehicleParameters.StrutSpringStiffnessRear * v27 * 1.2
	p26._actualStrutDampRear = p26.VehicleParameters.StrutSpringDampingRear * v28 * 1.12
end
function v_u_2._updateFromConfiguration(p_u_29)

	for v31 in pairs(p_u_29.VehicleParameters) do
		local v32 = v_u_30:GetAttribute(v31)

			if v31 == "MaxSpeed" or v31 == "ReverseSpeed" then
				v32 = v32 / 0.6263

		end
	end

		p_u_29._attrConn:Disconnect()

	p_u_29._attrConn = v_u_30.AttributeChanged:Connect(function(p34)
		-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_29, (copy) v_u_30

					p_u_29:_gravityAdjust()
				end
				p_u_29:InitializeDrivingValues()
			end
		end
	end)
end
function v_u_2._setMotorTorqueDamped(p37, p38, p39, p40)
	for _, v41 in ipairs(p37._motors) do
		if p37.VehicleParameters.MaxSpeed == 0 then
			v41.MotorMaxTorque = 0
		else
			local v42 = p37.VehicleParameters.MaxSpeed
			if p40 < 0 and p39 < 0 then
				v42 = p37.VehicleParameters.ReverseSpeed
			end
			local v43 = p37.driverSeat
			local v44
			if v43 then
				local v45 = v43.Velocity.Magnitude / v42
				v44 = math.abs(v45) or 0
			else
				v44 = 0
			end
			local v46 = -3 * v44 * v44
			v41.MotorMaxTorque = math.exp(v46) * p38
		end
	end
end
function v_u_2.InitializeDrivingValues(p47)

	p47._motors = v_u_8(p47.constraints)

		p47._steeringPrismatic.UpperLimit = p47.VehicleParameters.MaxSteer
		p47._steeringPrismatic.LowerLimit = -p47.VehicleParameters.MaxSteer

		v53.Damping = v55

		v60.MotorMaxTorque = 10000
	end
end

function v_u_2.GetAverageVelocity(p67)
	local v68 = #p67._motors
	if v68 == 0 then
		return 0
	end
	local v69 = 0
	for _, v70 in ipairs(p67._motors) do
		v69 = v69 + v70.Attachment1.WorldAxis:Dot(v70.Attachment1.Parent.RotVelocity)
	end
	return v69 / v68
end
function v_u_2.UpdateSteering(p71, p72, p73)
	if p71._steeringPrismatic then
		local v74 = p71.VehicleParameters.MaxSteer
		if p71._limitSteerAtHighVel and p71.VehicleParameters.MaxSpeed > 0 then
			p72 = p72 / (p71._steerLimit * (math.abs(p73) / p71.VehicleParameters.MaxSpeed) + 1)
		end
		p71._steeringPrismatic.TargetPosition = p72 ^ 7 * v74
	end
end
function v_u_2.UpdateThrottle(p75, p76, p77)
	local v78 = 0
	if math.abs(p77) < 0.1 then
		local v79 = p75._motors
		for _, v80 in ipairs(v79) do
			v80.MotorMaxAngularAcceleration = (1 / 0)
		end
		local v81 = p75._motors
		for _, v82 in ipairs(v81) do
			v82.MotorMaxTorque = 2000
		end
	else
		local v83 = p77 * p76
		if math.sign(v83) > 0 or math.abs(p76) < 0.5 then
			local v84 = p75._motors
			for _, v85 in ipairs(v84) do
				v85.MotorMaxAngularAcceleration = (1 / 0)
			end
			local v86 = p75.driverSeat
			local v87 = v86 and (v86.Velocity or Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)) or Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
			local v88 = v87.Magnitude
			local v89 = (v88 > 0.001 and v87 / v88 or (v86 and (v86.CFrame.LookVector or Vector3.new(0, 0, 1)) or Vector3.new(0, 0, 1))):Dot(v86 and v86.CFrame.LookVector or Vector3.new(0, 0, 1))
			p75:_setMotorTorqueDamped(p75._actualDrivingTorque * p77 * p77, v89, (math.sign(p77)))
			local v90 = v89 < 0 and p77 < 0 and p75.VehicleParameters.ReverseSpeed or p75.VehicleParameters.MaxSpeed
			v78 = math.sign(p77) * v90
		else
			local v91 = p75._motors
			for _, v92 in ipairs(v91) do
				v92.MotorMaxAngularAcceleration = 100
			end
			local v93 = p75._motors
			local v94 = p75._actualBrakingTorque * p77 * p77
			for _, v95 in ipairs(v93) do
				v95.MotorMaxTorque = v94
			end
			v78 = math.sign(p77) * 500
		end
	end
	p75:SetMotorVelocity(v78)
end
function v_u_2.Reset(p96)
	p96:UpdateThrottle(1, 1)
	p96:UpdateSteering(1, 0)
	local v97 = p96._motors
	local v98 = p96._actualBrakingTorque
	for _, v99 in ipairs(v97) do
		v99.MotorMaxTorque = v98
	end
	p96:SetMotorVelocity(0)
	p96:UpdateSteering(0, 0)
end

	local v2 = math.floor(p1)
	local v3 = tostring(v2)
	local v4

		v3 = v3:sub(2)
		v4 = "-"

		v4 = ""
	end

		end
	end

end

function v11.formatNumber(p13, p14, p15, p16)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_10
	local function v19(p17)
		repeat
			local v18
			p17, v18 = p17:gsub("^(-?%d+)(%d%d%d)", "%1,%2", 1)
		until v18 == 0
		return p17
	end
	if p14 then
		local v20 = math.round(p13)
		for _, v21 in ipairs(v_u_10) do
			local v22 = v21[1]
			local v23 = v21[2]

				local v24 = v20 / v22
				return "$" .. string.format("%.2f", v24):gsub("%.?0+$", "") .. v23
			end
		end
	end
	if p16 and p16 > 0 then
		local v25 = math.floor(p13)
		local v26 = p13 - v25
		local v27 = v19((tostring(v25)))
		if v26 ~= 0 then
			v27 = v27 .. string.format("%." .. p16 .. "f", v26):sub(2)
		end
		return v27 .. (p15 and "\194\162" or "")
	else
		local v28 = math.round(p13)
		local v29, v30 = math.modf(v28)
		local v31 = v19((tostring(v29)))
		if v30 ~= 0 then
			v31 = v31 .. string.format("%.2f", v30):sub(2)
		end
		return v31 .. (p15 and "\194\162" or "")
	end
end
function v11.create(p32, p33)

			return v39
		end
	end

end
function v11.formatWeightKg(p41)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_9
	if p41 < 1000 then
		return v_u_9(p41 + 0.5) .. " kg"
	end
	local v42 = p41 / 1000
	if p41 >= 100000 then
		return v_u_9(v42 + 0.5) .. " tons"
	end
	local v43 = v42 * 10 + 0.5
	local v44 = math.floor(v43) / 10
	local v45 = math.floor(v44)
	local v46 = (v44 - v45) * 10 + 0.5
	local v47 = math.floor(v46)
	return v_u_9(v45) .. "." .. tostring(v47) .. " tons"
end
function v11.count(p48)
	local v49 = 0
	for _ in p48 do
		v49 = v49 + 1
	end
	return v49
end
function v11.experienceToLevel(p50)
	if not p50 then
		return 1
	end
	local v51 = p50 / 80
	if v51 < 1 then
		return 1
	end
	local v52 = v51 ^ 0.5
	return math.floor(v52) + 1
end

return function(p_u_3, p_u_4)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_2
	local v_u_5 = p_u_3.write
	local v_u_6 = p_u_4.write
	return {
		["read"] = function(p7, p8)
			-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_3, (copy) p_u_4
			local v9 = buffer.readu16(p7, p8)
			local v10 = p8 + 2
			local v11 = {}

				local v12, v13 = p_u_3.read(p7, v10)
				local v14 = v10 + v13
				local v15, v16 = p_u_4.read(p7, v14)
				v10 = v14 + v16
				v11[v12] = v15
			end
			return v11, v10 - p8
		end,
		["write"] = function(p17)
			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_6
			local v18 = 0
			for _ in p17 do
				v18 = v18 + 1
			end
			v_u_2(v18)
			for v19, v20 in p17 do
				v_u_5(v19)
				v_u_6(v20)
			end
		end
	}
end

			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_4

				return nil, 1
			end
			local v8, v9 = v_u_4(p6, p7 + 1)
			return v8, v9 + 1
		end,

			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_5

			v_u_2(v11)
			if v11 then
				v_u_5(p10)
			end
		end
	}
end

local v_u_3 = require(script.Parent.Parent.replicated.values)
require(script.Parent.Parent.types)
local v_u_4 = v1:IsServer() and "server" or "client"
return function(p_u_5)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_3
	local v_u_6 = {}
	local v_u_7 = {}
	if v_u_4 == "server" then
		local v8 = {}
		local v9 = 0
		for v10 in p_u_5 do
			v9 = v9 + 1
			v8[v10] = v9
			v_u_6[v9] = p_u_5[v10]
			v_u_7[v9] = v10
		end
		v_u_2.add(v8)
	elseif v_u_4 == "client" then
		v_u_2.add(p_u_5)
		local v11 = v_u_2.currentName()
		for v12, v13 in v_u_3.access(v11):read().structs[v_u_2.currentLength()] do
			v_u_6[v13] = p_u_5[v12]
			v_u_7[v13] = v12
		end
	end
	return {
		["read"] = function(p14, p15)
			-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_5, (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_7
			local v16 = table.clone(p_u_5)
			local v17 = p15
			for v18, v19 in v_u_6 do
				local v20, v21 = v19.read(p14, p15)
				v16[v_u_7[v18]] = v20
				p15 = p15 + v21
			end
			return v16, p15 - v17
		end,
		["write"] = function(p22)
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_7
			for v23, v24 in v_u_6 do
				v24.write(p22[v_u_7[v23]])
			end
		end
	}
end

>>> SOURCE: ReplicatedStorage.Lists.Packets.ByteNet.namespaces.namespace
local v1 = game:GetService("RunService")
local v_u_2 = require(script.Parent.Parent.replicated.values)
require(script.Parent.Parent.types)
local v_u_3 = require(script.Parent.namespacesDependencies)
local v_u_4 = require(script.Parent.packetIDs)
local v_u_5 = v1:IsServer() and "server" or "client"
local v_u_6 = 0
return function(p7, p8)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_3, (copy) v_u_5, (ref) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_4
	local v9 = v_u_2.access(p7)
	v_u_3.start(p7)
	local v10 = p8()
	local v11 = v_u_3.empty()
	local v12 = {}
	if v_u_5 ~= "server" then
		if v_u_5 == "client" then
			local v13 = v9:read()
			for v14, v15 in v10 do
				v12[v14] = v15(v13.packets[v14])
				v_u_4.set(v13.packets[v14], v12[v14])
			end
		end
		return v12
	end
	local v16 = {
		["structs"] = {},
		["packets"] = {}
	}
	for v17 in v10 do
		v_u_6 = v_u_6 + 1
		v16.packets[v17] = v_u_6
		v12[v17] = v10[v17](v_u_6)
		v_u_4.set(v_u_6, v12[v17])
	end
	for v18, v19 in v11 do
		v16.structs[v18] = v19
	end
	v9:write(v16)
	return v12
end
<<< END SOURCE


>>> SOURCE: ReplicatedStorage.Lists.Packets.ByteNet.namespaces.namespacesDependencies
local v_u_1 = nil
local v_u_2 = nil
return {
	["start"] = function(p3)
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_1, (ref) v_u_2
		v_u_1 = {}
		v_u_2 = p3
	end,
	["add"] = function(p4)
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_1
		if v_u_1 then
			local v5 = v_u_1
			table.insert(v5, p4)
		end
	end,
	["currentLength"] = function()
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_1
		return v_u_1 and #v_u_1 or 0
	end,
	["currentName"] = function()
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_2
		return v_u_2
	end,
	["empty"] = function()
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_1
		if v_u_1 == nil then
			return {}
		end
		local v6 = v_u_1
		v_u_1 = nil
		return v6
	end
}
<<< END SOURCE

>>> SOURCE: ReplicatedStorage.Lists.Packets.ByteNet.packets.packet
local v_u_1 = game:GetService("Players")
local v2 = game:GetService("RunService")
require(script.Parent.Parent.types)
local v_u_3 = require(script.Parent.Parent.process.client)
local v_u_4 = require(script.Parent.Parent.process.server)
local v_u_5 = v2:IsServer() and "server" or "client"
return function(p6, p_u_7)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_3, (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_1
	local v8 = p6.reliabilityType or "reliable"
	local v_u_9 = {}
	local v_u_10
	if v8 == "reliable" then
		v_u_10 = v_u_4.sendPlayerReliable
	else
		v_u_10 = v_u_4.sendPlayerUnreliable
	end
	local v_u_11
	if v8 == "reliable" then
		v_u_11 = v_u_4.sendAllReliable
	else
		v_u_11 = v_u_4.sendAllUnreliable
	end
	local v_u_12
	if v8 == "reliable" then
		v_u_12 = v_u_3.sendReliable
	else
		v_u_12 = v_u_3.sendUnreliable
	end
	local v_u_13 = p6.value.write
	local v14 = {}
	local v16 = {
		["__index"] = function(p15)
			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_5
			if (p15 == "sendTo" or (p15 == "sendToAllExcept" or p15 == "sendToAll")) and v_u_5 == "client" then
				error("You cannot use sendTo, sendToAllExcept, or sendToAll on the client")
			elseif p15 == "send" and v_u_5 == "server" then
				error("You cannot use send on the server")
			end
		end
	}
	setmetatable(v14, v16)
	v14.reader = p6.value.read
	if v_u_5 == "server" then
		function v14.sendToList(p17, p18)
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_10, (copy) p_u_7, (copy) v_u_13
			for _, v19 in p18 do
				v_u_10(v19, p_u_7, v_u_13, p17)
			end
		end
		function v14.sendToListExcept(p20, p21)
			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_1, (copy) v_u_10, (copy) p_u_7, (copy) v_u_13
			for _, v22 in v_u_1:GetPlayers() do
				if not table.find(p21, v22) then
					v_u_10(v22, p_u_7, v_u_13, p20)
				end
			end
		end
		function v14.sendTo(p23, p24)
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_10, (copy) p_u_7, (copy) v_u_13
			v_u_10(p24, p_u_7, v_u_13, p23)
		end
		function v14.sendToAllExcept(p25, p26)
			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_1, (copy) v_u_10, (copy) p_u_7, (copy) v_u_13
			for _, v27 in v_u_1:GetPlayers() do
				if v27 ~= p26 then
					v_u_10(v27, p_u_7, v_u_13, p25)
				end
			end
		end
		function v14.sendToAll(p28)
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_11, (copy) p_u_7, (copy) v_u_13
			v_u_11(p_u_7, v_u_13, p28)
		end
	elseif v_u_5 == "client" then
		function v14.send(p29)
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_12, (copy) p_u_7, (copy) v_u_13
			v_u_12(p_u_7, v_u_13, p29)
		end
	end
	function v14.wait()
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_9
		local v_u_30 = nil
		local v_u_31 = coroutine.running()
		local v32 = v_u_9
		local function v35(p33, p34)
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_31, (ref) v_u_9, (ref) v_u_30
			task.spawn(v_u_31, p33, p34)
			table.remove(v_u_9, v_u_30)
		end
		table.insert(v32, v35)
		v_u_30 = #v_u_9
		return coroutine.yield()
	end
	function v14.listen(p36)
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_9
		local v37 = v_u_9
		table.insert(v37, p36)
	end
	function v14.getListeners()
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_9
		return v_u_9
	end
	return v14
end

	if not v_u_10[p18] then

	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_1

end

local v_u_1 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v2 = game:GetService("RunService")
local v_u_3 = require(script.Parent.replicatedValue)
local v_u_4 = v2:IsServer() and "server" or "client"
local v_u_5 = nil
local v_u_6 = {}
return {
	["start"] = function()
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_1, (ref) v_u_5
		if v_u_4 == "server" then
			local v7 = Instance.new("Folder")
			v7.Name = "BytenetStorage"
			v7.Parent = v_u_1
			v_u_5 = v7
		elseif v_u_4 == "client" then
			v_u_5 = v_u_1:WaitForChild("BytenetStorage")
		end
	end,
	["access"] = function(p8)
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_4, (ref) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_3
		if v_u_6[p8] then
			return v_u_6[p8]
		end
		if v_u_4 == "client" then
			local v9 = v_u_5:FindFirstChild(p8)
			if v9 and v9:IsA("StringValue") then
				local v10 = v_u_3(v9)
				v_u_6[p8] = v10
				return v10
			end
		elseif v_u_4 == "server" then
			local v11 = Instance.new("StringValue")
			v11.Name = p8
			v11.Parent = v_u_5
			local v12 = v_u_3(v11)
			v_u_6[p8] = v12
			return v12
		end
		return v_u_6[p8]
	end
}

function v_u_1.getTreeTypeIndex(p22)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if type(p22) == "number" then
		return p22
	end
	for v23, v24 in v_u_1 do
		if typeof(v24) ~= "function" and v24.tree == p22 then
			return v23
		end
	end
end
function v_u_1.getRandomSpecies(p25, p26)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	local v27 = Random.new(p26)
	local v28 = v_u_1[p25].species
	local v29 = {}
	for v30 in v28 do
		table.insert(v29, v30)
	end
	table.sort(v29)
	local v31 = 0
	for _, v32 in v29 do
		v31 = v31 + v28[v32].rarity
	end
	local v33 = v27:NextNumber(0, v31)
	local v34 = 0
	for _, v35 in v29 do
		v34 = v34 + v28[v35].rarity
		if v33 <= v34 then
			return v35
		end
	end
	return v29[#v29]
end
function v_u_1.isSaplingExclusive(p36, p37)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	local v38 = v_u_1.getRandomSpecies(p36, p37)
	if not v38 then
		return false
	end
	local v39 = v_u_1[p36].species[v38]
	if v39 then
		v39 = v39.saplingExclusive == true
	end
	return v39
end
return v_u_1

>>> SOURCE: ReplicatedStorage.Assets.DialogConversations.Merchant
local v1 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v_u_2 = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local v_u_3 = require(v1.Lists.Packets)
local v_u_4 = require(v1.Lists.TreeSpecies)
local v_u_5 = require(v1.Lists.Globals)
local v_u_6 = require(v1.Common.TreeAppraisal)
local v7 = require(v1.Lists.Schema)
local v_u_8 = require(v_u_2.PlayerScripts.Controllers.DataController)
local v_u_9 = require(v_u_2.PlayerScripts.Controllers.NotificationController)
local v_u_10 = v7.Inventory.key
return function(p11, p12, p13)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_8, (copy) v_u_10, (copy) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_9, (copy) v_u_3, (copy) v_u_2
	return p11.new({
		["npc"] = p12,
		["prompt"] = p13,
		["anchor_part"] = p12.PrimaryPart,
		["highlight"] = true,
		["player_response_lifetime"] = 2.5,
		["post_player_delay"] = 0.5,
		["npc_extra_fade_delay"] = 1.7,
		["max_distance"] = 17,
		["greeting"] = "Got anything to sell?",
		["options"] = function(p_u_14)
			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_8, (ref) v_u_10, (ref) v_u_4, (ref) v_u_6, (ref) v_u_5, (ref) v_u_9, (ref) v_u_3, (ref) v_u_2
			return {
				{
					["text"] = "I want to sell my inventory.",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_8, (ref) v_u_10, (ref) v_u_4, (ref) v_u_6, (ref) v_u_5, (copy) p_u_14, (ref) v_u_9, (ref) v_u_3
						local v15 = 0
						for _, v16 in v_u_8:Get(v_u_10).trees do
							if not v16.favorite then
								local v17 = v16.data
								local v18 = v17.treeTemplateIndex
								v15 = v15 + v_u_6:Appraise(v18, v_u_4.getRandomSpecies(v18, v17.seed), v17.scale, v17.mutations)
							end
						end
						local v19 = v_u_5.formatNumber(v15, false, true)
						p_u_14:Talk((("Here is <font family=\"Ubuntu\" color=\"#fff34f\">%*</font>."):format(v19)))
						v_u_9:Notify((("Sold inventory for <font family=\"rbxasset://fonts/families/Inconsolata.json\" color=\"rgb(255, 246, 119)\"><b>%*</b></font>."):format(v19)))
						v_u_3.sell.send(true)
					end
				},
				{
					["text"] = "I want to sell this.",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_2, (copy) p_u_14, (ref) v_u_8, (ref) v_u_10, (ref) v_u_4, (ref) v_u_6, (ref) v_u_5, (ref) v_u_9, (ref) v_u_3
						local v20 = v_u_2.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
						if not (v20 and v20:GetAttribute("IsTree")) then
							p_u_14:Talk("You\'re not holding a tree.")
							return
						end
						for _, v21 in v_u_8:Get(v_u_10).trees do
							if v21.id == v20:GetAttribute("InventoryId") then
								local v22 = v21.data.treeTemplateIndex
								local v23 = v_u_6:Appraise(v22, v_u_4.getRandomSpecies(v22, v21.data.seed), v21.data.scale)
								local v24 = v_u_5.formatNumber(v23, false, true)
								p_u_14:Talk((("Here is <font family=\"Ubuntu\" color=\"#fff34f\">%*</font>."):format(v24)))
								v_u_9:Notify((("Sold tree for <font family=\"rbxasset://fonts/families/Inconsolata.json\" color=\"rgb(255, 246, 119)\"><b>%*</b></font>."):format(v24)))
								break
							end
						end
						v_u_3.sell.send(false)
					end
				},
				{
					["text"] = "How much is this worth?",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_2, (copy) p_u_14, (ref) v_u_8, (ref) v_u_10, (ref) v_u_4, (ref) v_u_6, (ref) v_u_5
						local v25 = v_u_2.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
						if v25 and v25:GetAttribute("IsTree") then
							for _, v26 in v_u_8:Get(v_u_10).trees do
								if v26.id == v25:GetAttribute("InventoryId") then
									local v27 = v26.data.treeTemplateIndex
									local v28 = v_u_6:Appraise(v27, v_u_4.getRandomSpecies(v27, v26.data.seed), v26.data.scale)
									p_u_14:Talk((("I\'ll give you <font family=\"Ubuntu\" color=\"#fff34f\">%*</font> for it."):format((v_u_5.formatNumber(v28, false, true)))))
									return
								end
							end
						else
							p_u_14:Talk("You\'re not holding a tree.")
						end
					end
				},
				{
					["text"] = "Nevermind.",
					["action"] = function() end
				}
			}
		end
	})
end

local v1 = game:GetService("Players")
local v2 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v_u_3 = require(v1.LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts.Controllers.MarketController)
local v_u_4 = require(v2.Lists.Packets)
return function(p5, p6, p7)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_3
	return p5.new({
		["npc"] = p6,
		["prompt"] = p7,
		["anchor_part"] = p6.PrimaryPart,
		["highlight"] = true,
		["player_response_lifetime"] = 2.5,
		["post_player_delay"] = 0.5,
		["npc_extra_fade_delay"] = 1.7,
		["max_distance"] = 17,
		["greeting"] = "Here\'s what I have for sale.",
		["options"] = function()
			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_4, (ref) v_u_3
			v_u_4.market_key_handshake.send({
				["marketIndex"] = 5
			})
			task.wait(0.4)
			v_u_3:ViewMarket(5)
		end
	})
end

>>> SOURCE: ReplicatedStorage.Assets.DialogConversations.Joey
local v1 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v2 = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
require(v1.Lists.Packets)
require(v1.Lists.TreeSpecies)
require(v1.Lists.Globals)
require(v1.Common.TreeAppraisal)
local v3 = require(v1.Lists.Schema)
require(v2.PlayerScripts.Controllers.DataController)
require(v2.PlayerScripts.Controllers.NotificationController)
local _ = v3.Inventory.key
return function(p4, p5, p6)
	return p4.new({
		["npc"] = p5,
		["prompt"] = p6,
		["anchor_part"] = p5.PrimaryPart,
		["highlight"] = true,
		["player_response_lifetime"] = 2.5,
		["post_player_delay"] = 0.5,
		["npc_extra_fade_delay"] = 1.7,
		["page_words_cutoff"] = 99,
		["max_distance"] = 17,
		["greeting"] = "Have you heard the rumors of the Christmas Tree..?",
		["options"] = function(p_u_7)
			return {
				{
					["text"] = "No, what\'s that?",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_7
						p_u_7:Talk("The legends say a mythical Christmas Tree spawns in this biome... but I\'ve never seen one myself.")
					end
				},
				{
					["text"] = "Nevermind.",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_7
						p_u_7:Talk("Okay... cya.")
					end
				}
			}
		end
	})
end

>>> SOURCE: ReplicatedStorage.Assets.DialogConversations.Mimi
local v1 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v2 = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
require(v1.Lists.Packets)
require(v1.Lists.TreeSpecies)
require(v1.Lists.Globals)
require(v1.Common.TreeAppraisal)
local v3 = require(v1.Lists.Schema)
require(v2.PlayerScripts.Controllers.DataController)
require(v2.PlayerScripts.Controllers.NotificationController)
local _ = v3.Inventory.key
return function(p4, p5, p6)
	return p4.new({
		["npc"] = p5,
		["prompt"] = p6,
		["anchor_part"] = p5.PrimaryPart,
		["highlight"] = true,
		["player_response_lifetime"] = 2.5,
		["post_player_delay"] = 0.5,
		["npc_extra_fade_delay"] = 1.7,
		["npc_page_chars"] = 50,
		["npc_page_read_wps"] = 3.8,
		["npc_page_min_wait"] = 0.7,
		["npc_page_max_wait"] = 2.8,
		["page_words_cutoff"] = 99,
		["max_distance"] = 17,
		["greeting"] = "This biome has to be one of the most beautiful! \240\159\140\184",
		["options"] = function(p_u_7)
			return {
				{
					["text"] = "How long have you been here?",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_7
						p_u_7:Talk("I grew up here with my family. My father was an esteemed lumberjack of this biome, trading sakura logs to Perry for a pretty penny!")
					end
				},
				{
					["text"] = "Is there anything I should know about this biome?",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_7
						p_u_7:Talk("Well... some say there is a very rare elder sakura tree here... but I\'ve never seen it all my life. Just rumors...")
					end
				},
				{
					["text"] = "Got to go!",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_7
						p_u_7:Talk("Have a good one!")
					end
				}
			}
		end
	})
end
<<< END SOURCE


>>> SOURCE: ReplicatedStorage.Assets.DialogConversations.Isaak
local v1 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v2 = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
require(v1.Lists.Packets)
require(v1.Lists.TreeSpecies)
require(v1.Lists.Globals)
require(v1.Common.TreeAppraisal)
local v3 = require(v1.Lists.Schema)
require(v2.PlayerScripts.Controllers.DataController)
require(v2.PlayerScripts.Controllers.NotificationController)
local _ = v3.Inventory.key
return function(p4, p5, p6)
	return p4.new({
		["npc"] = p5,
		["prompt"] = p6,
		["anchor_part"] = p5.PrimaryPart,
		["highlight"] = true,
		["player_response_lifetime"] = 2.5,
		["post_player_delay"] = 0.5,
		["npc_extra_fade_delay"] = 1.7,
		["max_distance"] = 17,
		["greeting"] = "Want to join me for a moment of meditation?",
		["options"] = function(p_u_7)
			return {
				{
					["text"] = "Sure!",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_7
						p_u_7:Talk("In all this tree-cutting, we often lose track of time and ourselves. Breathe in and out. Take a moment of quiet, embody your inner serene, think positive thoughts Listen to the birds chirp and the slight wind we call a breeze. Feel yourself be moved by your thoughts and your inner self. Listen to yourself. Hear your soul. Breathe in and out. Close your eyes, relax. Think about what is most important to you. Open your eyes. Come back and meditate with me soon.", 28)
					end
				},
				{
					["text"] = "Nah.",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_7
						p_u_7:Talk("Okay... cya.")
					end
				}
			}
		end
	})
end

		["npc"] = p5,
		["prompt"] = p6,
		["anchor_part"] = p5.PrimaryPart,
		["highlight"] = true,
		["player_response_lifetime"] = 2.5,

		["npc_page_min_wait"] = 0.7,

		["page_words_cutoff"] = 99,
		["max_distance"] = 17,

		["options"] = function(p_u_7)
			return {

					["text"] = "Bugs?",

					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_7

		["prompt"] = p6,
		["anchor_part"] = p5.PrimaryPart,

		["player_response_lifetime"] = 2.5,

>>> SOURCE: ReplicatedStorage.Assets.DialogConversations.Lucas
local v1 = game:GetService("Players")
local v2 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v_u_3 = require(v1.LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts.Controllers.MarketController)
local v_u_4 = require(v2.Lists.Packets)
return function(p5, p6, p7)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_3, (copy) v_u_4
	return p5.new({
		["npc"] = p6,
		["prompt"] = p7,
		["anchor_part"] = p6.PrimaryPart,
		["highlight"] = true,
		["player_response_lifetime"] = 2.5,
		["post_player_delay"] = 0.5,
		["npc_extra_fade_delay"] = 1.7,
		["max_distance"] = 17,
		["greeting"] = "Here\'s what I have for sale.",
		["options"] = function()
			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_3, (ref) v_u_4
			if not v_u_3:DoesMarketDataExist(1) then
				v_u_4.market_key_handshake.send({
					["marketIndex"] = 1
				})
			end
			task.wait(0.4)
			v_u_3:ViewMarket(1)
		end
	})
end
<<< END SOURCE

>>> SOURCE: ReplicatedStorage.Assets.DialogConversations.Robbie
local v1 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v2 = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
require(v1.Lists.Packets)
require(v1.Lists.TreeSpecies)
require(v1.Lists.Globals)
require(v1.Common.TreeAppraisal)
local v3 = require(v1.Lists.Schema)
require(v2.PlayerScripts.Controllers.DataController)
require(v2.PlayerScripts.Controllers.NotificationController)
local _ = v3.Inventory.key
return function(p4, p5, p6)
	return p4.new({
		["npc"] = p5,
		["prompt"] = p6,
		["anchor_part"] = p5.PrimaryPart,
		["highlight"] = true,
		["player_response_lifetime"] = 2.5,
		["post_player_delay"] = 0.5,
		["npc_extra_fade_delay"] = 1.7,
		["npc_page_chars"] = 50,
		["npc_page_read_wps"] = 3.8,
		["npc_page_min_wait"] = 0.7,
		["npc_page_max_wait"] = 2.8,
		["page_words_cutoff"] = 99,
		["max_distance"] = 17,
		["greeting"] = "Are you looking for more info about mutations?",
		["options"] = function(p_u_7)
			return {
				{
					["text"] = "How do I get mutations?",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_7
						p_u_7:Talk("Charge up your swing and aim for green to increase your luck! The more luck you have, the higher the chance of a mutation!")
					end
				},
				{
					["text"] = "Are there any other ways of getting more luck?",

>>> SOURCE: ReplicatedStorage.Assets.DialogConversations.BuyATV
local v1 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v2 = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local v_u_3 = require(v1.Lists.Packets)
local v_u_4 = require(v1.Lists.Globals)
local v5 = require(v1.Lists.Schema)
local v_u_6 = require(v2.PlayerScripts.Controllers.DataController)
local v_u_7 = require(v2.PlayerScripts.Controllers.NotificationController)
local v_u_8 = v5.Currency.key
local v_u_9 = v5.Plot.key
local v_u_10 = v5.HasATV.key
return function(p11, p12, p13)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_10, (copy) v_u_8, (copy) v_u_9, (copy) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_7, (copy) v_u_3
	return p11.new({
		["npc"] = p12,
		["prompt"] = p13,
		["anchor_part"] = p12.PrimaryPart,
		["highlight"] = true,
		["player_response_lifetime"] = 2.5,
		["post_player_delay"] = 0.5,
		["npc_extra_fade_delay"] = 1.7,
		["npc_page_chars"] = 50,
		["npc_page_read_wps"] = 3.8,
		["npc_page_min_wait"] = 0.7,
		["npc_page_max_wait"] = 2.8,
		["page_words_cutoff"] = 99,
		["max_distance"] = 17,
		["greeting"] = "Hey! How can I help you?",
		["options"] = function(p_u_14)
			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_6, (ref) v_u_10, (ref) v_u_8, (ref) v_u_9, (ref) v_u_4, (ref) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_3
			return {
				{
					["text"] = "<font color=\"rgb(44, 255, 104)\">I\'d like to buy an ATV</font>",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_6, (ref) v_u_10, (copy) p_u_14, (ref) v_u_8, (ref) v_u_9, (ref) v_u_4, (ref) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_3
						if v_u_6:Get(v_u_10) == true then
							p_u_14:Talk("You already have an ATV!")
							return
						else
							local v15 = v_u_6:Get(v_u_8)
							local v16 = type(v15) == "number" and v15 and v15 or 0
							local v17 = v_u_6:Get(v_u_9)
							local v18 = type(v17) == "table" and (#v17 or 0) or 0
							local v19 = 500 - v16
							local v20 = math.max(0, v19)
							local v21 = 3 - v18
							local v22 = math.max(0, v21)
							if v20 > 0 then
								p_u_14:Talk((("You need %* more Sheckles!"):format((v_u_4.formatNumber(v20, true, true)))))
								v_u_7:Notify(("Need %* more Sheckles."):format((v_u_4.formatNumber(v20, true, true))), "red")
								return
							elseif v22 > 0 then
								p_u_14:Talk((("Place %* more tree%* on your plot!"):format(v22, v22 == 1 and "" or "s")))
								v_u_7:Notify(("Place %* more tree%* on your plot."):format(v22, v22 == 1 and "" or "s"), "red")
							else
								p_u_14:Talk("<font color=\"rgb(90,255,140)\">Great! Here\'s your ATV!</font>")
								v_u_3.vehicle_buy.send()
								task.wait(1)
								v_u_7:Announce("Click the ATV button on the left to equip!")
							end
						end
					end
				},
				{
					["text"] = "Nevermind.",
					["action"] = function()
						-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_14
						p_u_14:Talk("Come back soon!")
					end
				}
			}
		end
	})
end

function v_u_7.UpdateThrottle(p79, p80)
	-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_28, (ref) v_u_7, (copy) v_u_52, (ref) v_u_8, (copy) v_u_6, (ref) v_u_9, (copy) v_u_4

		end

		end
	end

end

function v_u_16.Enable(p_u_70)

			-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_70

			p_u_70.igniting = true

				-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_70, (ref) v_u_1
				p_u_70.ignitionSound.Volume = p_u_70.ignitionMaxVolume
				p_u_70.ignitionSound:Play()

				until not (p_u_70.igniting and p_u_70.ignitionSound.IsPlaying)
				p_u_70.igniting = false
			end)()
		end
		for v72 = 1, #v_u_15 do
			v_u_15[v72].Sound:Play()
		end
	end
end

end

function v_u_16.OnHeartbeat(p81, p82)

		return false
	end

function v_u_12.DisplayTouchDriveControls(p_u_31)
	p_u_31.brakeButton.Visible = true
	p_u_31.accelButton.Visible = true
	local v_u_32 = false
	local v_u_33 = false
	local v_u_34 = false
	p_u_31.accelButton.InputBegan:Connect(function(p35)
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_32, (copy) p_u_31, (ref) v_u_33, (ref) v_u_34
		if p35.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			v_u_32 = true
			p_u_31.accelButton.ImageTransparency = 1
			p_u_31.accelButton.Pressed.ImageTransparency = 0
			if v_u_32 and v_u_33 or not (v_u_32 or v_u_33) then
				p_u_31.throttleInput = 0
			elseif v_u_32 then
				p_u_31.throttleInput = 1
			elseif v_u_33 then
				p_u_31.throttleInput = -1
			end
			if v_u_34 then
				p_u_31.handBrakeInput = 1
				return
			end
			p_u_31.handBrakeInput = 0
		end
	end)
	p_u_31.accelButton.InputEnded:Connect(function(p36)
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_32, (copy) p_u_31, (ref) v_u_33, (ref) v_u_34
		if p36.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			v_u_32 = false
			p_u_31.accelButton.ImageTransparency = 0
			p_u_31.accelButton.Pressed.ImageTransparency = 1
			if v_u_32 and v_u_33 or not (v_u_32 or v_u_33) then
				p_u_31.throttleInput = 0
			elseif v_u_32 then
				p_u_31.throttleInput = 1
			elseif v_u_33 then
				p_u_31.throttleInput = -1
			end
			if v_u_34 then
				p_u_31.handBrakeInput = 1
				return
			end
			p_u_31.handBrakeInput = 0
		end
	end)
	local v_u_37 = 0
	local v_u_38 = 0
	p_u_31.brakeButton.InputBegan:Connect(function(p39)
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_37, (ref) v_u_34, (ref) v_u_38, (ref) v_u_33, (copy) p_u_31, (ref) v_u_32
		if p39.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			if tick() - v_u_37 <= 0.3 then
				v_u_34 = true
			else
				v_u_38 = tick()
				v_u_33 = true
			end
			p_u_31.brakeButton.ImageTransparency = 1
			p_u_31.brakeButton.Pressed.ImageTransparency = 0
			if v_u_32 and v_u_33 or not (v_u_32 or v_u_33) then
				p_u_31.throttleInput = 0
			elseif v_u_32 then
				p_u_31.throttleInput = 1
			elseif v_u_33 then
				p_u_31.throttleInput = -1
			end
			if v_u_34 then
				p_u_31.handBrakeInput = 1
				return
			end
			p_u_31.handBrakeInput = 0
		end
	end)
	p_u_31.brakeButton.InputEnded:Connect(function(p40)
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_34, (ref) v_u_38, (ref) v_u_37, (ref) v_u_33, (copy) p_u_31, (ref) v_u_32
		if p40.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			if not v_u_34 and tick() - v_u_38 <= 0.2 then
				v_u_37 = tick()
			end
			v_u_38 = 0
			v_u_34 = false
			v_u_33 = false
			p_u_31.brakeButton.ImageTransparency = 0
			p_u_31.brakeButton.Pressed.ImageTransparency = 1
			if v_u_32 and v_u_33 or not (v_u_32 or v_u_33) then
				p_u_31.throttleInput = 0
			elseif v_u_32 then
				p_u_31.throttleInput = 1
			elseif v_u_33 then
				p_u_31.throttleInput = -1
			end
			if v_u_34 then
				p_u_31.handBrakeInput = 1
				return
			end
			p_u_31.handBrakeInput = 0
		end
	end)
end
function v_u_12.EnableTouchControls(p41)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_6, (ref) v_u_16, (ref) v_u_17
	if not p41.touchEnabled then
		p41.touchEnabled = true
		local v42
		if v_u_6.Character then
			v42 = v_u_6.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
		else
			v42 = nil
		end
		if v42 then
			v_u_16 = v42.JumpPower
			v42.JumpPower = 0
			v_u_17 = true
		end
		p41:ConfigureButtons()
		if p41.driverControlsEnabled then
			p41:DisplayTouchDriveControls()
		end
	end
end
function v_u_12.DisableTouchControls(p43)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_6, (ref) v_u_17, (ref) v_u_16
	if p43.touchEnabled then
		p43.touchEnabled = false
		local v44
		if v_u_6.Character then
			v44 = v_u_6.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
		else
			v44 = nil
		end
		if v_u_17 and v44 then
			v44.JumpPower = v_u_16
			v_u_17 = false
		end
		p43.brakeButton.Visible = false
		p43.accelButton.Visible = false
	end
end
function v_u_12.EnableKeyboardUI(p45)
	p45:DisableTouchControls()
end
function v_u_12.EnableTouchUI(p46)
	p46:EnableTouchControls()
end
function v_u_12.EnableGamepadUI(p47)
	p47:DisableTouchControls()
end
return v_u_12

local v1 = game:GetService("Players")
game:GetService("UserInputService")
game:GetService("ContextActionService")
game:GetService("CollectionService")
local v_u_2 = v1.LocalPlayer
local v_u_3 = {
	["OnExitFunctions"] = {}
}
local v4 = script.Parent.Parent
v4:WaitForChild("Animations")
local v5 = v4.Remotes
local v_u_6 = v5:WaitForChild("ExitSeat")
local v_u_7 = {}
function v_u_3.ExitSeat()
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_3, (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_7
	local v8
	if v_u_2.Character then
		v8 = v_u_2.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	else
		v8 = nil
	end
	if not v8 then
		return false
	end
	local v9 = v8.Parent
	if v9.Humanoid.Sit == true then
		for _, v10 in ipairs(v9.HumanoidRootPart:GetJoints()) do
			if v10.Name == "SeatWeld" then
				local v11 = v10.Part0:FindFirstChild("PromptLocation")
				if v11 then
					local v12 = v11:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ProximityPrompt")
					if v12 and v12.Name == "EndorsedVehicleProximityPromptV1" then
						for _, v13 in pairs(v_u_3.OnExitFunctions) do
							v13(v10.Part0)
						end
						v_u_6:FireServer()
						for _, v14 in pairs(v_u_7) do
							v14:Stop()
						end
						return true
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end
end
function v_u_3.OnSeatExitEvent(p15)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_3
	local v16 = v_u_3.OnExitFunctions
	table.insert(v16, p15)
end
function v_u_3.DisconnectFromSeatExitEvent(p17)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_3
	local v18 = {}
	for _, v19 in ipairs(v_u_3.OnExitFunctions) do
		if v19 ~= p17 then
			table.insert(v18, v19)
		end
	end
	v_u_3.OnExitFunctions = v18
end
v5.ExitSeat.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(p20)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_3, (copy) v_u_2
	for _, v21 in pairs(v_u_3.OnExitFunctions) do
		v21(nil)
	end
	if p20 then
		local v22
		if v_u_2.Character then
			v22 = v_u_2.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
		else
			v22 = nil
		end
		if v22 then
			v22:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.GettingUp)
		end
	end
end)
return v_u_3

				until not (p_u_70.igniting and p_u_70.ignitionSound.IsPlaying)

		end
	end

end

function v_u_16.OnHeartbeat(p81, p82)

		return

	if not v_u_84 then

	local v8
	if v_u_2.Character then
		v8 = v_u_2.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")

						end

						for _, v14 in pairs(v_u_7) do
							v14:Stop()
						end
						return true
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end
end

local function v_u_18(p10, p11, p12, p13, p14)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_18
	local v15 = (p14 == nil and 0 or p14) + 1
	local v16, v17 = v_u_2:FindPartOnRayWithIgnoreList(Ray.new(p10, p11 * p12), p13)
	if v16 and (v16.CanCollide == false and v15 <= 5) then
		v16, v17 = v_u_18(v17, p11, p12 - (p10 - v17).magnitude, p13, v15)
	end
	return v16, v17
end
local function v_u_35(p19, p20, p21, p22)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_18, (ref) v_u_4

		p22:Destroy()

			if v24 then
				v24:Play()
			end
		end

			while true do

					break
				end

			end

			local v29 = v28.magnitude
			local v30 = v28.unit

			if v31 then
				v23.CFrame = CFrame.new(v25.Position)
				p20:MoveTo(v25.Position + Vector3.new(0, 8, 0))
				p21 = v25
			else
				v23.CFrame = CFrame.new(v27)
				p21 = v25
			end
		else

			p20:MoveTo(p21.Position + Vector3.new(0, 8, 0))
		end

		else

				if math.abs(v34) <= 0.01 then
					break

			end

		end
	end

local function v_u_37(_, p36)
	if p36 and p36.Parent then
		if not p36.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("Scripts") then
			warn("Flip Error: Scripts file not found. Please parent seats to the chassis model")
			return
		end
		if not p36.Parent.Parent.Scripts:FindFirstChild("Chassis") then
			warn("Flip Error: Chassis module not found.")
			return
		end
		require(p36.Parent.Parent.Scripts.Chassis).Redress()
	end
end
function v_u_6.EjectCharacter(p38)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_35, (copy) v_u_1
	if p38 and p38.HumanoidRootPart then

			if v39.Name == "SeatWeld" then
				v_u_35(v_u_1:GetPlayerFromCharacter(p38), p38, v39.Part0, v39)
				return
			end
		end
	end
end

end

function v_u_6.AddSeat(p_u_52, p_u_53, p_u_54)

game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v1 = game:GetService("RunService")
local v2 = game:GetService("StarterPlayer")
local v_u_3 = require(script.FootstepSounds)
local v_u_4 = 0.3
local _ = v2.CharacterWalkSpeed
local v_u_5 = script.Parent
local v_u_6 = v_u_5:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local v_u_7 = 0
local function v13(p8)
	-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_3
	v_u_7 = v_u_7 + p8
	if v_u_4 <= v_u_7 then
		v_u_7 = 0
		local v9 = (v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").AssemblyLinearVelocity * Vector3.new(1, 0, 1)).Magnitude
		if v_u_6.MoveDirection.Magnitude == 0 or v9 <= 4 then
			return
		end
		local v10 = v_u_6.FloorMaterial
		if v10 == Enum.Material.Air or v10 == Enum.Material.Water then
			return
		end
		local v11 = v_u_3:GetRandomSound((v_u_3:GetTableFromMaterial(v10)))
		local v12 = Instance.new("Sound")
		v12.SoundId = v11
		v12.Volume = 0.05
		v12.PlayOnRemove = true
		v12.Parent = script
		v12:Destroy()
		v_u_4 = 0.003 * v9 + 0.24
	end
end
v1.RenderStepped:Connect(v13)
v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart"):WaitForChild("Running").Volume = 0

function v_u_1.CreateSoundGroup(_, p2, p3, p4, p5)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if not p2 then
		warn("Parent not specified, Footstep folder parented to workspace")
	end
	local v6 = p5 or false
	local v7 = p4 or {}
	local v8 = p2 or workspace
	local v9
	if v6 then
		v9 = Instance.new("Folder")
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	else
		v9 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
		v9.Volume = 1
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	end
	for v10, v11 in pairs(v_u_1.SoundIds) do
		local v12 = 0
		local v13
		if v6 then
			v13 = Instance.new("Folder")
			v13.Name = v10
		else
			v13 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
			v13.Volume = 1
			v13.Name = v10
		end
		for _, v14 in pairs(v11) do
			v12 = v12 + 1
			local v15 = Instance.new("Sound")
			v15.Name = string.format("%s_%02i", v10:lower(), v12)
			if not v6 then
				v15.SoundGroup = v13
			end
			for v16, v17 in pairs(v7) do
				v15[v16] = v17
			end
			v15.SoundId = v14
			v15.Parent = v13
		end
		v13.Parent = v9
	end
	v9.Parent = v8
	return v9
end
function v_u_1.GetTableFromMaterial(_, p18)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if typeof(p18) == "string" then
		p18 = Enum.Material[p18]
	end
	return v_u_1.MaterialMap[p18]
end
function v_u_1.GetRandomSound(_, p19)
	return p19[math.random(#p19)]
end
return v_u_1

game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v1 = game:GetService("RunService")
local v2 = game:GetService("StarterPlayer")
local v_u_3 = require(script.FootstepSounds)
local v_u_4 = 0.3
local _ = v2.CharacterWalkSpeed
local v_u_5 = script.Parent
local v_u_6 = v_u_5:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local v_u_7 = 0
local function v13(p8)
	-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_3
	v_u_7 = v_u_7 + p8
	if v_u_4 <= v_u_7 then
		v_u_7 = 0
		local v9 = (v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").AssemblyLinearVelocity * Vector3.new(1, 0, 1)).Magnitude
		if v_u_6.MoveDirection.Magnitude == 0 or v9 <= 4 then
			return
		end
		local v10 = v_u_6.FloorMaterial
		if v10 == Enum.Material.Air or v10 == Enum.Material.Water then
			return
		end
		local v11 = v_u_3:GetRandomSound((v_u_3:GetTableFromMaterial(v10)))
		local v12 = Instance.new("Sound")
		v12.SoundId = v11
		v12.Volume = 0.05
		v12.PlayOnRemove = true
		v12.Parent = script
		v12:Destroy()
		v_u_4 = 0.003 * v9 + 0.24
	end
end
v1.RenderStepped:Connect(v13)
v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart"):WaitForChild("Running").Volume = 0

			v15.SoundId = v14
			v15.Parent = v13
		end
		v13.Parent = v9
	end
	v9.Parent = v8
	return v9

game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v1 = game:GetService("RunService")
local v2 = game:GetService("StarterPlayer")
local v_u_3 = require(script.FootstepSounds)
local v_u_4 = 0.3
local _ = v2.CharacterWalkSpeed
local v_u_5 = script.Parent
local v_u_6 = v_u_5:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local v_u_7 = 0
local function v13(p8)
	-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_3
	v_u_7 = v_u_7 + p8
	if v_u_4 <= v_u_7 then
		v_u_7 = 0
		local v9 = (v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").AssemblyLinearVelocity * Vector3.new(1, 0, 1)).Magnitude
		if v_u_6.MoveDirection.Magnitude == 0 or v9 <= 4 then
			return
		end
		local v10 = v_u_6.FloorMaterial
		if v10 == Enum.Material.Air or v10 == Enum.Material.Water then
			return
		end
		local v11 = v_u_3:GetRandomSound((v_u_3:GetTableFromMaterial(v10)))
		local v12 = Instance.new("Sound")
		v12.SoundId = v11
		v12.Volume = 0.05
		v12.PlayOnRemove = true
		v12.Parent = script
		v12:Destroy()
		v_u_4 = 0.003 * v9 + 0.24
	end
end
v1.RenderStepped:Connect(v13)
v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart"):WaitForChild("Running").Volume = 0

function v_u_1.CreateSoundGroup(_, p2, p3, p4, p5)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if not p2 then
		warn("Parent not specified, Footstep folder parented to workspace")
	end
	local v6 = p5 or false
	local v7 = p4 or {}
	local v8 = p2 or workspace
	local v9
	if v6 then
		v9 = Instance.new("Folder")
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	else
		v9 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
		v9.Volume = 1
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	end
	for v10, v11 in pairs(v_u_1.SoundIds) do
		local v12 = 0
		local v13
		if v6 then
			v13 = Instance.new("Folder")
			v13.Name = v10
		else
			v13 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
			v13.Volume = 1
			v13.Name = v10
		end
		for _, v14 in pairs(v11) do
			v12 = v12 + 1
			local v15 = Instance.new("Sound")
			v15.Name = string.format("%s_%02i", v10:lower(), v12)
			if not v6 then
				v15.SoundGroup = v13
			end
			for v16, v17 in pairs(v7) do
				v15[v16] = v17
			end
			v15.SoundId = v14
			v15.Parent = v13
		end
		v13.Parent = v9
	end
	v9.Parent = v8
	return v9
end
function v_u_1.GetTableFromMaterial(_, p18)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if typeof(p18) == "string" then
		p18 = Enum.Material[p18]
	end
	return v_u_1.MaterialMap[p18]
end
function v_u_1.GetRandomSound(_, p19)
	return p19[math.random(#p19)]
end
return v_u_1

function v_u_1.CreateSoundGroup(_, p2, p3, p4, p5)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if not p2 then
		warn("Parent not specified, Footstep folder parented to workspace")
	end
	local v6 = p5 or false
	local v7 = p4 or {}
	local v8 = p2 or workspace
	local v9
	if v6 then
		v9 = Instance.new("Folder")
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	else
		v9 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
		v9.Volume = 1
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	end
	for v10, v11 in pairs(v_u_1.SoundIds) do
		local v12 = 0
		local v13
		if v6 then
			v13 = Instance.new("Folder")
			v13.Name = v10
		else
			v13 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
			v13.Volume = 1
			v13.Name = v10
		end
		for _, v14 in pairs(v11) do
			v12 = v12 + 1
			local v15 = Instance.new("Sound")
			v15.Name = string.format("%s_%02i", v10:lower(), v12)
			if not v6 then
				v15.SoundGroup = v13
			end
			for v16, v17 in pairs(v7) do
				v15[v16] = v17
			end
			v15.SoundId = v14
			v15.Parent = v13
		end
		v13.Parent = v9
	end
	v9.Parent = v8
	return v9
end
function v_u_1.GetTableFromMaterial(_, p18)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if typeof(p18) == "string" then
		p18 = Enum.Material[p18]
	end
	return v_u_1.MaterialMap[p18]
end
function v_u_1.GetRandomSound(_, p19)
	return p19[math.random(#p19)]
end
return v_u_1

game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v1 = game:GetService("RunService")
local v2 = game:GetService("StarterPlayer")
local v_u_3 = require(script.FootstepSounds)
local v_u_4 = 0.3
local _ = v2.CharacterWalkSpeed
local v_u_5 = script.Parent
local v_u_6 = v_u_5:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local v_u_7 = 0
local function v13(p8)
	-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_3
	v_u_7 = v_u_7 + p8
	if v_u_4 <= v_u_7 then
		v_u_7 = 0
		local v9 = (v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").AssemblyLinearVelocity * Vector3.new(1, 0, 1)).Magnitude
		if v_u_6.MoveDirection.Magnitude == 0 or v9 <= 4 then
			return
		end
		local v10 = v_u_6.FloorMaterial
		if v10 == Enum.Material.Air or v10 == Enum.Material.Water then
			return
		end
		local v11 = v_u_3:GetRandomSound((v_u_3:GetTableFromMaterial(v10)))
		local v12 = Instance.new("Sound")
		v12.SoundId = v11
		v12.Volume = 0.05
		v12.PlayOnRemove = true
		v12.Parent = script
		v12:Destroy()
		v_u_4 = 0.003 * v9 + 0.24
	end
end
v1.RenderStepped:Connect(v13)
v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart"):WaitForChild("Running").Volume = 0

function v_u_1.CreateSoundGroup(_, p2, p3, p4, p5)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if not p2 then
		warn("Parent not specified, Footstep folder parented to workspace")
	end
	local v6 = p5 or false
	local v7 = p4 or {}
	local v8 = p2 or workspace
	local v9
	if v6 then
		v9 = Instance.new("Folder")
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	else
		v9 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
		v9.Volume = 1
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	end
	for v10, v11 in pairs(v_u_1.SoundIds) do
		local v12 = 0
		local v13
		if v6 then
			v13 = Instance.new("Folder")
			v13.Name = v10
		else
			v13 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
			v13.Volume = 1
			v13.Name = v10
		end
		for _, v14 in pairs(v11) do
			v12 = v12 + 1
			local v15 = Instance.new("Sound")
			v15.Name = string.format("%s_%02i", v10:lower(), v12)
			if not v6 then
				v15.SoundGroup = v13
			end
			for v16, v17 in pairs(v7) do
				v15[v16] = v17
			end
			v15.SoundId = v14
			v15.Parent = v13
		end
		v13.Parent = v9
	end
	v9.Parent = v8
	return v9
end
function v_u_1.GetTableFromMaterial(_, p18)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if typeof(p18) == "string" then
		p18 = Enum.Material[p18]
	end
	return v_u_1.MaterialMap[p18]
end
function v_u_1.GetRandomSound(_, p19)
	return p19[math.random(#p19)]
end
return v_u_1

game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v1 = game:GetService("RunService")
local v2 = game:GetService("StarterPlayer")
local v_u_3 = require(script.FootstepSounds)
local v_u_4 = 0.3
local _ = v2.CharacterWalkSpeed
local v_u_5 = script.Parent
local v_u_6 = v_u_5:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local v_u_7 = 0
local function v13(p8)
	-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_3
	v_u_7 = v_u_7 + p8
	if v_u_4 <= v_u_7 then
		v_u_7 = 0
		local v9 = (v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").AssemblyLinearVelocity * Vector3.new(1, 0, 1)).Magnitude
		if v_u_6.MoveDirection.Magnitude == 0 or v9 <= 4 then
			return
		end
		local v10 = v_u_6.FloorMaterial
		if v10 == Enum.Material.Air or v10 == Enum.Material.Water then
			return
		end
		local v11 = v_u_3:GetRandomSound((v_u_3:GetTableFromMaterial(v10)))
		local v12 = Instance.new("Sound")
		v12.SoundId = v11
		v12.Volume = 0.05
		v12.PlayOnRemove = true
		v12.Parent = script
		v12:Destroy()
		v_u_4 = 0.003 * v9 + 0.24
	end
end
v1.RenderStepped:Connect(v13)
v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart"):WaitForChild("Running").Volume = 0

game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v1 = game:GetService("RunService")
local v2 = game:GetService("StarterPlayer")
local v_u_3 = require(script.FootstepSounds)
local v_u_4 = 0.3
local _ = v2.CharacterWalkSpeed
local v_u_5 = script.Parent
local v_u_6 = v_u_5:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local v_u_7 = 0
local function v13(p8)
	-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_3
	v_u_7 = v_u_7 + p8
	if v_u_4 <= v_u_7 then
		v_u_7 = 0
		local v9 = (v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").AssemblyLinearVelocity * Vector3.new(1, 0, 1)).Magnitude
		if v_u_6.MoveDirection.Magnitude == 0 or v9 <= 4 then
			return
		end
		local v10 = v_u_6.FloorMaterial
		if v10 == Enum.Material.Air or v10 == Enum.Material.Water then
			return
		end
		local v11 = v_u_3:GetRandomSound((v_u_3:GetTableFromMaterial(v10)))
		local v12 = Instance.new("Sound")
		v12.SoundId = v11
		v12.Volume = 0.05
		v12.PlayOnRemove = true
		v12.Parent = script
		v12:Destroy()
		v_u_4 = 0.003 * v9 + 0.24
	end
end
v1.RenderStepped:Connect(v13)
v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart"):WaitForChild("Running").Volume = 0

function v_u_1.CreateSoundGroup(_, p2, p3, p4, p5)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if not p2 then
		warn("Parent not specified, Footstep folder parented to workspace")
	end
	local v6 = p5 or false
	local v7 = p4 or {}
	local v8 = p2 or workspace
	local v9
	if v6 then
		v9 = Instance.new("Folder")
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	else
		v9 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
		v9.Volume = 1
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	end
	for v10, v11 in pairs(v_u_1.SoundIds) do
		local v12 = 0
		local v13
		if v6 then
			v13 = Instance.new("Folder")
			v13.Name = v10
		else
			v13 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
			v13.Volume = 1
			v13.Name = v10
		end
		for _, v14 in pairs(v11) do
			v12 = v12 + 1
			local v15 = Instance.new("Sound")
			v15.Name = string.format("%s_%02i", v10:lower(), v12)
			if not v6 then
				v15.SoundGroup = v13
			end
			for v16, v17 in pairs(v7) do
				v15[v16] = v17
			end
			v15.SoundId = v14
			v15.Parent = v13
		end
		v13.Parent = v9
	end
	v9.Parent = v8
	return v9
end
function v_u_1.GetTableFromMaterial(_, p18)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if typeof(p18) == "string" then
		p18 = Enum.Material[p18]
	end
	return v_u_1.MaterialMap[p18]
end
function v_u_1.GetRandomSound(_, p19)
	return p19[math.random(#p19)]
end
return v_u_1

game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v1 = game:GetService("RunService")
local v2 = game:GetService("StarterPlayer")
local v_u_3 = require(script.FootstepSounds)
local v_u_4 = 0.3
local _ = v2.CharacterWalkSpeed
local v_u_5 = script.Parent
local v_u_6 = v_u_5:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local v_u_7 = 0
local function v13(p8)
	-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_3
	v_u_7 = v_u_7 + p8
	if v_u_4 <= v_u_7 then
		v_u_7 = 0
		local v9 = (v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").AssemblyLinearVelocity * Vector3.new(1, 0, 1)).Magnitude
		if v_u_6.MoveDirection.Magnitude == 0 or v9 <= 4 then
			return
		end
		local v10 = v_u_6.FloorMaterial
		if v10 == Enum.Material.Air or v10 == Enum.Material.Water then
			return
		end
		local v11 = v_u_3:GetRandomSound((v_u_3:GetTableFromMaterial(v10)))
		local v12 = Instance.new("Sound")
		v12.SoundId = v11
		v12.Volume = 0.05
		v12.PlayOnRemove = true
		v12.Parent = script
		v12:Destroy()
		v_u_4 = 0.003 * v9 + 0.24
	end
end
v1.RenderStepped:Connect(v13)
v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart"):WaitForChild("Running").Volume = 0

function v_u_1.CreateSoundGroup(_, p2, p3, p4, p5)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if not p2 then
		warn("Parent not specified, Footstep folder parented to workspace")
	end
	local v6 = p5 or false
	local v7 = p4 or {}
	local v8 = p2 or workspace
	local v9
	if v6 then
		v9 = Instance.new("Folder")
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	else
		v9 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
		v9.Volume = 1
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	end
	for v10, v11 in pairs(v_u_1.SoundIds) do
		local v12 = 0
		local v13
		if v6 then
			v13 = Instance.new("Folder")
			v13.Name = v10
		else
			v13 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
			v13.Volume = 1
			v13.Name = v10
		end
		for _, v14 in pairs(v11) do
			v12 = v12 + 1
			local v15 = Instance.new("Sound")
			v15.Name = string.format("%s_%02i", v10:lower(), v12)
			if not v6 then
				v15.SoundGroup = v13
			end
			for v16, v17 in pairs(v7) do
				v15[v16] = v17
			end
			v15.SoundId = v14
			v15.Parent = v13
		end
		v13.Parent = v9
	end
	v9.Parent = v8
	return v9
end
function v_u_1.GetTableFromMaterial(_, p18)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if typeof(p18) == "string" then
		p18 = Enum.Material[p18]
	end
	return v_u_1.MaterialMap[p18]
end
function v_u_1.GetRandomSound(_, p19)
	return p19[math.random(#p19)]
end
return v_u_1

>>> SOURCE: StarterGui.HUD.Left.StarterPack.LocalScript
local v1 = game:GetService("Players")
local v2 = game:GetService("RunService")
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v3 = v1.LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts
local v_u_4 = require(v3.Controllers.DataController)
local v5 = require(v3.Controllers.UIController)
local v_u_6 = require(v3.Components.PurchasePrompt)
local v_u_7 = script.Parent
local v_u_8 = v_u_7.Icon
local v_u_9 = v_u_7.Timer
local v_u_10 = v_u_6.RobuxPurchases.Passes.starter_pack.id
local v_u_11 = tostring(v_u_10)
v_u_4:EnsureData()
local v_u_12 = nil
local v_u_13 = nil
local v14 = v_u_4:Get("diagnostics")
local v_u_15 = v14 and v14.playTime or 0
if v_u_15 < 600 then
	local v16 = v_u_4:Get("purchaseLog")
	local v17 = v16
	if v17 then
		v17 = v16.passes
	end
	if v17 then
		v17 = v17[v_u_11] ~= nil
	end
	if not v17 then
		v_u_7.Visible = v_u_15 >= 300
		if v_u_7.Visible then
			local v18 = 600 - v_u_15
			local v19 = v18 < 0 and 0 or v18
			local v20 = math.floor(v19)
			local v21 = math.max(0, v20)
			local v22 = v21 / 60
			local v23 = math.floor(v22)
			v_u_9.Text = ("%*m %*s"):format(v23, v21 - v23 * 60)
		end
		v5:CreateButton(v_u_7, function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_10
			v_u_6.prompt(v_u_10, "Game Pass")
		end)
		v_u_13 = v_u_4.DataUpdated:Connect(function(p24, p25)
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_11, (copy) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_12, (ref) v_u_13
			if p24 == "purchaseLog" then
				if p25 then
					p25 = p25.passes
				end
				if p25 and p25[v_u_11] ~= nil then
					v_u_7.Visible = false
					if v_u_12 then
						v_u_12:Disconnect()
						v_u_12 = nil
					end
					if v_u_13 then
						v_u_13:Disconnect()
						v_u_13 = nil
					end
				end
			end
		end)
		local v_u_26 = os.clock()
		local v_u_27 = 0
		v_u_12 = v2.Heartbeat:Connect(function(p28)
			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_15, (ref) v_u_27, (copy) v_u_7, (copy) v_u_26, (copy) v_u_8, (copy) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_9, (ref) v_u_12, (ref) v_u_13
			v_u_15 = v_u_15 + p28
			v_u_27 = v_u_27 + p28
			if v_u_7.Visible then
				local v29 = (os.clock() - v_u_26) % 3
				if v29 < 1 then
					local v30 = v_u_8
					local v31 = v29 * 6.283185307179586 * 2
					v30.Rotation = math.sin(v31) * 15
				else
					v_u_8.Rotation = 0
				end
			end
			if v_u_27 >= 1 then
				v_u_27 = v_u_27 - 1
				local v32 = v_u_4:Get("diagnostics")
				local v33 = v32 and v32.playTime or 0
				if v_u_15 < v33 then
					v_u_15 = v33
				end
				if not v_u_7.Visible and v_u_15 >= 300 then
					v_u_7.Visible = true
				end
				if v_u_7.Visible then
					local v34 = 600 - v_u_15
					local v35 = v34 < 0 and 0 or v34
					local v36 = v_u_9
					local v37 = math.floor(v35)
					local v38 = math.max(0, v37)
					local v39 = v38 / 60
					local v40 = math.floor(v39)
					v36.Text = ("%*m %*s"):format(v40, v38 - v40 * 60)
					if v35 <= 0 then
						v_u_7.Visible = false
						if v_u_12 then
							v_u_12:Disconnect()
							v_u_12 = nil
						end
						if v_u_13 then
							v_u_13:Disconnect()
							v_u_13 = nil
						end
					end
				end
			end
		end)
		return
	end
end
v_u_7.Visible = false
if v_u_12 then
	v_u_12:Disconnect()
	v_u_12 = nil
end
if v_u_13 then
	v_u_13:Disconnect()
	v_u_13 = nil
end

>>> SOURCE: StarterPlayer.StarterCharacterScripts.Footsteps
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v1 = game:GetService("RunService")
local v2 = game:GetService("StarterPlayer")
local v_u_3 = require(script.FootstepSounds)
local v_u_4 = 0.3
local _ = v2.CharacterWalkSpeed
local v_u_5 = script.Parent
local v_u_6 = v_u_5:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local v_u_7 = 0
local function v13(p8)
	-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_3
	v_u_7 = v_u_7 + p8
	if v_u_4 <= v_u_7 then
		v_u_7 = 0
		local v9 = (v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").AssemblyLinearVelocity * Vector3.new(1, 0, 1)).Magnitude
		if v_u_6.MoveDirection.Magnitude == 0 or v9 <= 4 then
			return
		end
		local v10 = v_u_6.FloorMaterial
		if v10 == Enum.Material.Air or v10 == Enum.Material.Water then
			return
		end
		local v11 = v_u_3:GetRandomSound((v_u_3:GetTableFromMaterial(v10)))
		local v12 = Instance.new("Sound")
		v12.SoundId = v11
		v12.Volume = 0.05
		v12.PlayOnRemove = true
		v12.Parent = script
		v12:Destroy()
		v_u_4 = 0.003 * v9 + 0.24
	end
end
v1.RenderStepped:Connect(v13)
v_u_5:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart"):WaitForChild("Running").Volume = 0
<<< END SOURCE

function v_u_1.CreateSoundGroup(_, p2, p3, p4, p5)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if not p2 then
		warn("Parent not specified, Footstep folder parented to workspace")
	end
	local v6 = p5 or false
	local v7 = p4 or {}
	local v8 = p2 or workspace
	local v9
	if v6 then
		v9 = Instance.new("Folder")
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	else
		v9 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
		v9.Volume = 1
		v9.Name = p3 or "Footsteps"
	end
	for v10, v11 in pairs(v_u_1.SoundIds) do
		local v12 = 0
		local v13
		if v6 then
			v13 = Instance.new("Folder")
			v13.Name = v10
		else
			v13 = Instance.new("SoundGroup")
			v13.Volume = 1
			v13.Name = v10
		end
		for _, v14 in pairs(v11) do
			v12 = v12 + 1
			local v15 = Instance.new("Sound")
			v15.Name = string.format("%s_%02i", v10:lower(), v12)
			if not v6 then
				v15.SoundGroup = v13
			end
			for v16, v17 in pairs(v7) do
				v15[v16] = v17
			end
			v15.SoundId = v14
			v15.Parent = v13
		end
		v13.Parent = v9
	end
	v9.Parent = v8
	return v9
end
function v_u_1.GetTableFromMaterial(_, p18)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if typeof(p18) == "string" then
		p18 = Enum.Material[p18]
	end
	return v_u_1.MaterialMap[p18]
end
function v_u_1.GetRandomSound(_, p19)
	return p19[math.random(#p19)]
end
return v_u_1

function v_u_2.new(p3, p4, p5, p6, p7, p8, p9, p10, p11)

		["Margins"] = p6,

		["EventFrame"] = p10,
		["Event"] = p11

	local v15 = setmetatable(v13, v14)
	p3.ImageRectSize = p4
	p3.ImageRectOffset = p6

function v_u_2.Play(p_u_16, p_u_17)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	p_u_16:Stop()
	local v_u_18 = p_u_16.ColumnCount
	local v_u_19 = p_u_16.SpriteSize
	local v_u_20 = p_u_16.Margins
	local v_u_21 = p_u_16.StartFrame
	local v_u_22 = 0
	local v_u_23 = 0
	p_u_16.IsRunning = true
	p_u_16.RunConnection = v_u_1.Heartbeat:Connect(function(p24)
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_22, (copy) p_u_16, (ref) v_u_21, (copy) p_u_17, (ref) v_u_23, (copy) v_u_18, (copy) v_u_19, (copy) v_u_20
		v_u_22 = v_u_22 + p24
		if v_u_22 >= p_u_16.FrameTime then
			v_u_22 = v_u_22 - p_u_16.FrameTime
			v_u_21 = v_u_21 + 1
			local v25
			if v_u_21 > p_u_16.FrameCount then
				v_u_21 = 1
				v25 = true
			else
				v25 = false
			end
			if p_u_16.Event and v_u_21 == p_u_16.EventFrame then
				p_u_16.Event()
			end
			if p_u_17 and v25 then
				v_u_23 = v_u_23 + 1
				if p_u_17 <= v_u_23 then
					p_u_16:Stop()
					return
				end
			end
			local v26 = v_u_21 / v_u_18
			local v27 = math.ceil(v26)
			local v28 = v_u_21 - (v27 - 1) * v_u_18
			local v29 = Vector2.new(v28 - 1, v27 - 1) * (v_u_19 + v_u_20) + v_u_20
			p_u_16.SpriteSheet.ImageRectOffset = v29
		end
	end)
end
function v_u_2.Stop(p30)
	if p30.IsRunning and p30.RunConnection then
		p30.RunConnection:Disconnect()
		p30.RunConnection = nil
		p30.IsRunning = false
	end
end

>>> SOURCE: StarterPlayer.StarterPlayerScripts.Components.CameraShake.Shaker.CameraShakeInstance
local v_u_1 = {}
v_u_1.__index = v_u_1
local v_u_2 = Vector3.new
local v_u_3 = math.noise
v_u_1.CameraShakeState = {
	["FadingIn"] = 0,
	["FadingOut"] = 1,
	["Sustained"] = 2,
	["Inactive"] = 3
}
function v_u_1.new(p4, p5, p6, p7)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_1
	local v8 = p6 == nil and 0 or p6
	local v9 = p7 == nil and 0 or p7
	local v10 = type(p4) == "number"
	assert(v10, "Magnitude must be a number")
	local v11 = type(p5) == "number"
	assert(v11, "Roughness must be a number")
	local v12 = type(v8) == "number"
	assert(v12, "FadeInTime must be a number")
	local v13 = type(v9) == "number"
	assert(v13, "FadeOutTime must be a number")
	local v14 = {
		["Magnitude"] = p4,
		["Roughness"] = p5,
		["PositionInfluence"] = v_u_2(),
		["RotationInfluence"] = v_u_2(),
		["DeleteOnInactive"] = true,
		["roughMod"] = 1,
		["magnMod"] = 1,
		["fadeOutDuration"] = v9,
		["fadeInDuration"] = v8,
		["sustain"] = v8 > 0,
		["currentFadeTime"] = v8 > 0 and 0 or 1,
		["tick"] = Random.new():NextNumber(-100, 100),
		["_camShakeInstance"] = true
	}
	local v15 = v_u_1
	return setmetatable(v14, v15)
end
function v_u_1.UpdateShake(p16, p17)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_3, (copy) v_u_2
	local v18 = p16.tick
	local v19 = p16.currentFadeTime
	local v20 = v_u_2(v_u_3(v18, 0) * 0.5, v_u_3(0, v18) * 0.5, v_u_3(v18, v18) * 0.5)
	if p16.fadeInDuration > 0 and p16.sustain then
		if v19 < 1 then
			v19 = v19 + p17 / p16.fadeInDuration
		elseif p16.fadeOutDuration > 0 then
			p16.sustain = false
		end
	end
	if not p16.sustain then
		v19 = v19 - p17 / p16.fadeOutDuration
	end
	if p16.sustain then
		p16.tick = v18 + p17 * p16.Roughness * p16.roughMod
	else
		p16.tick = v18 + p17 * p16.Roughness * p16.roughMod * v19
	end
	p16.currentFadeTime = v19
	return v20 * p16.Magnitude * p16.magnMod * v19
end
function v_u_1.StartFadeOut(p21, p22)
	if p22 == 0 then
		p21.currentFadeTime = 0
	end
	p21.fadeOutDuration = p22
	p21.fadeInDuration = 0
	p21.sustain = false
end
function v_u_1.StartFadeIn(p23, p24)
	if p24 == 0 then
		p23.currentFadeTime = 1
	end
	p23.fadeInDuration = p24 or p23.fadeInDuration
	p23.fadeOutDuration = 0
	p23.sustain = true
end
function v_u_1.GetScaleRoughness(p25)
	return p25.roughMod
end
function v_u_1.SetScaleRoughness(p26, p27)
	p26.roughMod = p27
end
function v_u_1.GetScaleMagnitude(p28)
	return p28.magnMod
end
function v_u_1.SetScaleMagnitude(p29, p30)
	p29.magnMod = p30
end
function v_u_1.GetNormalizedFadeTime(p31)
	return p31.currentFadeTime
end
function v_u_1.IsShaking(p32)
	return p32.currentFadeTime > 0 and true or p32.sustain
end
function v_u_1.IsFadingOut(p33)
	local v34 = not p33.sustain
	if v34 then
		v34 = p33.currentFadeTime > 0
	end
	return v34
end
function v_u_1.IsFadingIn(p35)
	local v36 = p35.currentFadeTime < 1 and p35.sustain
	if v36 then
		v36 = p35.fadeInDuration > 0
	end
	return v36
end
function v_u_1.GetState(p37)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1
	if p37:IsFadingIn() then
		return v_u_1.CameraShakeState.FadingIn
	elseif p37:IsFadingOut() then
		return v_u_1.CameraShakeState.FadingOut
	elseif p37:IsShaking() then
		return v_u_1.CameraShakeState.Sustained
	else
		return v_u_1.CameraShakeState.Inactive
	end
end
return v_u_1

function v_u_57._start(p95)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_8
	if v_u_8:GetAttribute("DialogInChat") then
		return
	else

		p95._session = p95._session + 1
		p95._npcLine = 0

		p95._can = false
		p95.prompt.Enabled = false
		p95:_hoverOff(true)
		p95:_startHeadFollow()
		p95:_startWatcher(v96)
		p95:Talk(p95.greeting)()

			local v97 = p95:_options()

				local v98 = v97[1]

					p95:PlayerResponse(v98.text)()
					if p95._session ~= v96 then
						return
					end
					if p95.postDelay > 0 then
						task.wait(p95.postDelay)
					end
				end
				if v98.action then
					v98.action(p95)
				end
				p95:_windDown(v96)
				return
			elseif #v97 == 0 then
				p95:_windDown(v96)
				return
			else
				local v99 = p95:_showChoices(v96, v97)
				if p95._session == v96 then
					if v99 then
						v99.wait()

							if p95.postDelay > 0 then
								task.wait(p95.postDelay)
							end
							if v99.action then
								v99.action(p95)
							end
							p95:_windDown(v96)
						end
					else
						return
					end
				else
					return
				end
			end
		else
			return
		end
	end
end

	end
end

end
function v_u_57._startHeadFollow(p_u_131)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_8
	if not p_u_131._headBindName then
		p_u_131._neck = (p_u_131.npc:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso") or p_u_131.npc:FindFirstChild("Torso")).Neck
		p_u_131._neckBaseC0 = p_u_131._neck.C0
		p_u_131._headBindName = "DialogHeadFollow_" .. os.time()
		v_u_6:BindToRenderStep(p_u_131._headBindName, Enum.RenderPriority.Last.Value + 100, function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_131, (ref) v_u_8
			local v132 = p_u_131._neck
			v132.C0 = p_u_131._neckBaseC0
			local v133 = v132.Part1
			local v134 = v_u_8.Character.Head.Position
			if v133 then
				local v135 = v134 - v133.Position
				local v136 = v135.X
				local v137 = v135.Z
				local v138 = Vector3.new(v136, 0, v137)
				if v138.Magnitude >= 0.0001 then
					local v139 = v138.Unit
					local v140 = v132.Part0.CFrame.LookVector
					local v141 = v140.X
					local v142 = v140.Z
					local v143 = Vector3.new(v141, 0, v142)
					local v144 = v143.Magnitude < 0.0001 and Vector3.new(0, 0, -1) or v143.Unit
					local v145 = -v144.X
					local v146 = -v144.Z
					local v147 = math.atan2(v145, v146)
					local v148 = -v139.X
					local v149 = -v139.Z
					local v150 = (math.atan2(v148, v149) - v147 + 3.141592653589793) % 6.283185307179586 - 3.141592653589793
					local v151 = v147 + math.clamp(v150, -1.0471975511965976, 1.0471975511965976)
					local v152 = -math.sin(v151)
					local v153 = -math.cos(v151)
					local v154 = Vector3.new(v152, 0, v153)
					local v155 = CFrame.lookAt(v133.Position, v133.Position + v154, Vector3.new(0, 1, 0))
					local v156 = v132.Part1.CFrame
					local v157 = v132.C1
					local v158 = v132.C0
					local v159 = v158 * v157:Inverse() * v156:Inverse() * v155 * v157
					v132.C0 = v159 - v159.Position + v158.Position
				end
			else
				return
			end
		end)
	end
end
function v_u_57._stopHeadFollow(p160)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_6
	if p160._headBindName then
		v_u_6:UnbindFromRenderStep(p160._headBindName)
		p160._headBindName = nil
		p160._neck.C0 = p160._neckBaseC0
	end
end

	function v_u_96.CheckTerms(p169, p170)
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_100, (ref) v_u_107
		local v171 = 0
		local v172 = p169.Tool

		if v172 then
			v173 = v171

					v171 = v171 + v176
					v173 = v171
				else
					v173 = v171
				end
			end
		else
			v173 = v171
		end
		return v173
	end

function changeSlot(p_u_302)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_3, (copy) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_52, (copy) v_u_5, (ref) v_u_53, (copy) v_u_74
	local v303 = not (v_u_3.GamepadEnabled or v_u_7.VREnabled) or v_u_52.Visible
	if p_u_302.Frame == v_u_5.SelectedObject and v303 then
		local v304 = getGamepadSwapSlot()
		if not v304 then
			local v_u_305 = p_u_302.Frame.Size
			local v_u_306 = p_u_302.Frame.Position
			p_u_302.Frame:TweenSizeAndPosition(v_u_305 + UDim2.fromOffset(10, 10), v_u_306 - UDim2.fromOffset(5, 5), Enum.EasingDirection.Out, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, 0.1, true, function()
				-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_302, (copy) v_u_305, (copy) v_u_306
				p_u_302.Frame:TweenSizeAndPosition(v_u_305, v_u_306, Enum.EasingDirection.In, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, 0.1, true)
			end)
			p_u_302.Frame.BorderSizePixel = 3
			v_u_53.SelectionImageObject.Visible = true
			return
		end
		v304.Frame.BorderSizePixel = 0
		if v304 ~= p_u_302 then
			p_u_302:Swap(v304)
			v_u_53.SelectionImageObject.Visible = false
			if v_u_74 < p_u_302.Index and not p_u_302.Tool then
				if v_u_5.SelectedObject == p_u_302.Frame then
					v_u_5.SelectedObject = v304.Frame
				end
				p_u_302:Delete()
			end
			if v_u_74 < v304.Index and not v304.Tool then
				if v_u_5.SelectedObject == v304.Frame then
					v_u_5.SelectedObject = p_u_302.Frame
				end
				v304:Delete()
				return
			end
		end
	else
		p_u_302:Select()
		v_u_53.SelectionImageObject.Visible = false
	end
end

			v308.Frame.BorderSizePixel = 0
		end
	end, false, Enum.KeyCode.ButtonB, Enum.KeyCode.ButtonStart)

		v_u_5.SelectedObject = v_u_51:FindFirstChild("1")
	end
end
function disableGamepadInventoryControl()
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_74, (copy) v_u_60, (copy) v_u_5, (ref) v_u_50

	end

		v_u_5.SelectedObject = nil
	end
end

end

	end
end

end

		p27 = v_u_15.topbarEnabled

		v_u_15.topbarEnabled = p27

function v_u_15.setState(p68, p69, p70, p71)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_11, (copy) v_u_19
	local v72 = p69 or (p68.isSelected and "Selected" or "Deselected")
	local v73 = v_u_11.formatStateName(v72)
	if p68.activeState ~= v73 then
		local v74 = p68.isSelected
		p68.activeState = v73
		if v73 == "Deselected" then
			p68.isSelected = false
			if v74 then
				p68.toggled:Fire(false, p70, p71)
				p68.deselected:Fire(p70, p71)
			end
			p68:_setToggleItemsVisible(false, p70, p71)
		elseif v73 == "Selected" then
			p68.isSelected = true
			if not v74 then
				p68.toggled:Fire(true, p70, p71)
				p68.selected:Fire(p70, p71)
				v_u_19:Fire(p68, p70, p71)
			end
			p68:_setToggleItemsVisible(true, p70, p71)
		end
		p68.stateChanged:Fire(v73, p70, p71)
	end
end
function v_u_15.getInstance(p_u_75, p_u_76)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_12
	local v77 = p_u_75.cachedNamesToInstances[p_u_76]
	if v77 then
		return v77
	end
	local function v_u_81(p_u_78, p_u_79)
		-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_75
		if not p_u_75.cachedInstances[p_u_79] then
			local v80 = p_u_79:GetAttribute("Collective")
			if v80 then
				v80 = p_u_75.cachedCollectives[v80]
			end
			if v80 then
				table.insert(v80, p_u_79)
			end
			p_u_75.cachedNamesToInstances[p_u_78] = p_u_79
			p_u_75.cachedInstances[p_u_79] = true
			p_u_79.Destroying:Once(function()
				-- upvalues: (ref) p_u_75, (copy) p_u_78, (copy) p_u_79
				p_u_75.cachedNamesToInstances[p_u_78] = nil
				p_u_75.cachedInstances[p_u_79] = nil
			end)
		end
	end
	local v82 = p_u_75.widget
	v_u_81("Widget", v82)
	if p_u_76 == "Widget" then
		return v82
	end
	local v_u_83 = nil
	local function v_u_89(p84)
		-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_75, (ref) v_u_12, (copy) v_u_89, (copy) v_u_81, (copy) p_u_76, (ref) v_u_83
		for _, v85 in pairs(p84:GetChildren()) do
			local v86 = v85:GetAttribute("WidgetUID")
			if not v86 or v86 == p_u_75.UID then
				local v87 = v_u_12.getRealInstance(v85) or v85
				v_u_89(v87)
				if v87:IsA("GuiBase") or (v87:IsA("UIBase") or v87:IsA("ValueBase")) then
					local v88 = v87.Name
					v_u_81(v88, v87)
					if v88 == p_u_76 then
						v_u_83 = v87
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end
	v_u_89(v82)
	return v_u_83
end
function v_u_15.getCollective(p90, p91)
	local v92 = p90.cachedCollectives[p91]
	if v92 then
		return v92
	end
	local v93 = {}
	for v94, _ in pairs(p90.cachedInstances) do
		if v94:GetAttribute("Collective") == p91 then
			table.insert(v93, v94)
		end
	end
	p90.cachedCollectives[p91] = v93
	return v93
end
function v_u_15.getInstanceOrCollective(p95, p96)
	local v97 = {}
	local v98 = p95:getInstance(p96)
	if v98 then
		table.insert(v97, v98)
	end
	if #v97 == 0 then
		v97 = p95:getCollective(p96)
	end
	return v97
end

		p99.appearance[v101] = v102

end

function v_u_15.setImage(p146, p_u_147, p148)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_2
	p146:modifyTheme({
		"IconImage",
		"Image",
		p_u_147,
		p148
	})
	task.spawn(function()
		-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_147, (ref) v_u_2
		local v149 = p_u_147
		local v150
		if tonumber(v149) then
			v150 = ("rbxassetid://%*"):format(p_u_147)
		else
			v150 = p_u_147
		end

end
