function v_u_15.convertLabelToNumberSpinner(p_u_270, p_u_271, p_u_272)
	task.defer(function()
		-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_270, (copy) p_u_271, (copy) p_u_272
		local v_u_273 = p_u_270:getInstance("IconLabel")
		v_u_273.Transparency = 1
		p_u_271.Parent = v_u_273.Parent
		p_u_271.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
		p_u_271.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		p_u_271.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, 0)
		p_u_271.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
		p_u_271.ClipsDescendants = false
		for _, v_u_274 in ipairs({
			"FontFace",
			"BorderSizePixel",
			"BorderColor3",
			"Rotation",
			"TextStrokeTransparency",
			"TextStrokeColor3",
			"TextStrokeTransparency",
			"TextColor3"
		}) do
			p_u_271[v_u_274] = v_u_273[v_u_274]
			p_u_270:addToJanitor(v_u_273:GetPropertyChangedSignal(v_u_274):Connect(function()
				-- upvalues: (ref) p_u_271, (copy) v_u_274, (copy) v_u_273
				p_u_271[v_u_274] = v_u_273[v_u_274]
			end))
		end
		local function v_u_279()
			-- upvalues: (ref) p_u_271
			local v275 = 0
			local v276 = 0
			for _, v277 in p_u_271.Frame:GetChildren() do
				local v278 = string.lower(v277.Name)
				if v278 == "digit" then
					v275 = v275 + v277.AbsoluteSize.X
					v276 = v276 + 1
				elseif (v278 == "prefix" or (v278 == "suffix" or v278 == "comma")) and v277.Text ~= "" then
					v275 = v275 + v277.AbsoluteSize.X
					v276 = v276 + 1
				end
			end
			return v275, v276
		end
		local function v_u_288()
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_279, (ref) p_u_270, (ref) p_u_271, (copy) v_u_273
			local v280, v281 = v_u_279()
			if v281 < 18 then
				p_u_270:setLabel(p_u_271.Value)
			end
			local v282 = p_u_271.Frame.AbsoluteSize.X
			while v280 < v282 and p_u_270.isDestroyed ~= true do
				task.wait(0.05)
				if v281 > 0 and v281 < 8 then
					p_u_271.TextSize = v_u_273.TextSize
					break
				end
				local v283 = p_u_271
				v283.TextSize = v283.TextSize + 1
				v282 = p_u_271.Frame.AbsoluteSize.X
				v280, v281 = v_u_279()
			end
			local v284 = v_u_273.Parent
			if v284 then
				v284 = v284.Parent
			end
			local v285
			if v284 == nil then
				v285 = 0
			elseif v284.IconImage.Visible == true then
				v285 = p_u_271.Frame.AbsoluteSize.X + v_u_273.Parent.Parent.IconImage.AbsoluteSize.X
			else
				v285 = v284.AbsoluteSize.X
			end
			while v285 < v280 and p_u_270.isDestroyed ~= true do
				task.wait(0.05)
				if v281 < 8 and v281 > 0 then
					p_u_271.TextSize = v_u_273.TextSize
					return
				end
				local v286 = p_u_271
				v286.TextSize = v286.TextSize - 1
				local v287 = v_u_273.Parent
				if v287 then
					v287 = v287.Parent
				end
				if v287 == nil then
					v285 = 0
				elseif v287.IconImage.Visible == true then
					v285 = p_u_271.Frame.AbsoluteSize.X + v_u_273.Parent.Parent.IconImage.AbsoluteSize.X
				else
					v285 = v287.AbsoluteSize.X
				end
				v280, v281 = v_u_279()
			end
		end
		p_u_270:addToJanitor(p_u_271.Frame.ChildAdded:Connect(v_u_288))
		p_u_270:addToJanitor(p_u_271.Frame.ChildRemoved:Connect(v_u_288))
		p_u_270:addToJanitor(p_u_270.iconAdded:Connect(function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_288
			task.wait(1)
			v_u_288()
		end))
		p_u_270:updateParent()
		p_u_271.Name = "LabelSpinner"
		p_u_271.Prefix = "$"
		p_u_271.Commas = true
		p_u_271.Decimals = 0
		p_u_271.Duration = 0.25
		p_u_271.Value = 10
		task.wait(0.2)
		local v289 = p_u_272
		if typeof(v289) == "function" then
			p_u_272()
		end
	end)
	return p_u_270
end

		v_u_15.iconRemoved:Fire(p290)
	end
end

function v_u_1.reverseTable(p15)

function v_u_1.joinFeature(p_u_122, p_u_123, p_u_124, p125)
	local v126 = p_u_122.joinJanitor
	v126:clean()
	if p125 then
		p_u_122.parentIconUID = p_u_123.UID
		p_u_122.joinedFrame = p125
		v126:add(p_u_123.alignmentChanged:Connect(function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_123, (copy) p_u_122
			local v127 = p_u_123.alignment
			p_u_122:setAlignment(v127 == "Center" and "Left" or v127, true)
		end))
		local v128 = p_u_123.alignment
		p_u_122:setAlignment(v128 == "Center" and "Left" or v128, true)
		p_u_122:modifyTheme({ "IconButton", "BackgroundTransparency", 1 }, "JoinModification")
		p_u_122:modifyTheme({ "ClickRegion", "Active", false }, "JoinModification")
		if p_u_123.childModifications then
			task.defer(function()
				-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_122, (copy) p_u_123
				p_u_122:modifyTheme(p_u_123.childModifications, p_u_123.childModificationsUID)
			end)
		end
		local v_u_129 = p_u_122:getInstance("ClickRegion")
		local function v130()
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_129, (copy) p_u_123
			v_u_129.Selectable = p_u_123.isSelected
		end
		v126:add(p_u_123.toggled:Connect(v130))
		task.defer(v130)
		v126:add(function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_129
			v_u_129.Selectable = true
		end)
		local v_u_131 = p_u_122.UID
		table.insert(p_u_124, v_u_131)
		p_u_123:autoDeselect(false)
		p_u_123.childIconsDict[v_u_131] = true
		if not p_u_123.isEnabled then
			p_u_123:setEnabled(true)
		end
		p_u_122.joinedParent:Fire(p_u_123)
		v126:add(function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_122, (copy) p_u_124, (copy) v_u_131, (copy) p_u_123
			if not p_u_122.joinedFrame then
				return
			end
			for v132, v133 in pairs(p_u_124) do
				if v133 == v_u_131 then
					table.remove(p_u_124, v132)
					break
				end
			end

				p_u_122:setAlignment(p_u_122.originalAlignment)

					break

					v134:setEnabled(false)
				end

				p_u_122:setAlignment(v137 == "Center" and "Left" or v137, true)

end

		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_9

			end)

	if typeof(p27) ~= "boolean" then
		p27 = v_u_15.topbarEnabled
	end
	if not p28 then
		v_u_15.topbarEnabled = p27
	end
	for _, v29 in pairs(v_u_15.container) do
		v29.Enabled = p27
	end
end
function v_u_15.modifyBaseTheme(p30)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_12, (copy) v_u_15, (copy) v_u_18
	local v31 = v_u_12.getModifications(p30)
	for _, v32 in pairs(v31) do
		for _, v33 in pairs(v_u_15.baseTheme) do
			v_u_12.merge(v33, v32)
		end
	end
	for _, v34 in pairs(v_u_18) do
		v34:setTheme(v_u_15.baseTheme)
	end
end

		v_u_44 = true
		if v_u_38.locked then
			return
		else
			local v46 = tick()
			if v46 - v_u_45 < 0.1 then
				return
			else
				v_u_45 = v46

					v_u_38:deselect("User", v_u_38)

					v_u_38:select("User", v_u_38)

			end
		end
	end)
	v43.TouchTap:Connect(function()
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_44, (copy) v_u_38, (ref) v_u_45
		if not v_u_44 then
			if v_u_38.locked then
				return
			end
			local v47 = tick()
			if v47 - v_u_45 < 0.1 then
				return
			end
			v_u_45 = v47
			if v_u_38.isSelected then
				v_u_38:deselect("User", v_u_38)
				return
			end
			v_u_38:select("User", v_u_38)
		end
	end)
	v40:add(v_u_1.InputBegan:Connect(function(p48, p49)
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_38, (ref) v_u_45
		if not v_u_38.locked then
			if v_u_38.bindedToggleKeys[p48.KeyCode] and not p49 then
				if v_u_38.locked then
					return
				end

					return
				end
				v_u_45 = v50

					v_u_38:deselect("User", v_u_38)
					return
				end
				v_u_38:select("User", v_u_38)
			end
		end
	end))
	local function v51()
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_38
		if not v_u_38.locked then
			v_u_38.isViewing = false
			v_u_38.viewingEnded:Fire(true)
			v_u_38:setState(nil, "User", v_u_38)
		end
	end
	v_u_38.joinedParent:Connect(function()

			if v_u_38.locked then
				return
			end
			v_u_38.isViewing = false
			v_u_38.viewingEnded:Fire(true)
			v_u_38:setState(nil, "User", v_u_38)
		end
	end)
	v43.MouseEnter:Connect(function()

		local v52 = v_u_1.PreferredInput ~= v_u_22.desktop
		if not v_u_38.locked then
			v_u_38.isViewing = true
			v_u_38.viewingStarted:Fire(true)
			if not v52 then
				v_u_38:setState("Viewing", "User", v_u_38)
			end
		end
	end)
	local v_u_53 = 0
	v40:add(v_u_1.TouchEnded:Connect(v51))
	v43.MouseLeave:Connect(v51)
	v43.SelectionGained:Connect(function(p54)

				-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_55, (ref) v_u_53, (ref) v_u_38

					if v_u_38.locked then

					end

					v_u_38:setState("Viewing", "User", v_u_38)

		end
	end)
	v43.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_53
		v_u_53 = v_u_53 + 1
	end)
	local v_u_56 = v_u_38:getInstance("IconOverlay")
	v_u_38.viewingStarted:Connect(function()

		v_u_56.Visible = not v_u_38.overlayDisabled
	end)
	v_u_38.viewingEnded:Connect(function()
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_56
		v_u_56.Visible = false
	end)
	v40:add(v_u_19:Connect(function(p57)
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_38

			v_u_38:deselect("AutoDeselect", p57)
		end
	end))
	local v58 = debug.info(2, "s")
	local v59 = string.split(v58, ".")
	local v60 = game
	local v61 = nil
	for _, v62 in pairs(v59) do
		v60 = v60:FindFirstChild(v62)
		if not v60 then
			break
		end
		if v60:IsA("ScreenGui") then
			v61 = v60
		end
	end

			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_38
			v_u_38:destroy()
		end)
	end

	end)

	end)
	v_u_38.deselected:Connect(function()

function v_u_15.setState(p68, p69, p70, p71)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_11, (copy) v_u_19
	local v72 = p69 or (p68.isSelected and "Selected" or "Deselected")
	local v73 = v_u_11.formatStateName(v72)
	if p68.activeState ~= v73 then
		local v74 = p68.isSelected
		p68.activeState = v73
		if v73 == "Deselected" then
			p68.isSelected = false
			if v74 then
				p68.toggled:Fire(false, p70, p71)
				p68.deselected:Fire(p70, p71)
			end
			p68:_setToggleItemsVisible(false, p70, p71)
		elseif v73 == "Selected" then
			p68.isSelected = true
			if not v74 then
				p68.toggled:Fire(true, p70, p71)
				p68.selected:Fire(p70, p71)
				v_u_19:Fire(p68, p70, p71)
			end
			p68:_setToggleItemsVisible(true, p70, p71)
		end
		p68.stateChanged:Fire(v73, p70, p71)
	end
end
function v_u_15.getInstance(p_u_75, p_u_76)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_12
	local v77 = p_u_75.cachedNamesToInstances[p_u_76]
	if v77 then
		return v77
	end
	local function v_u_81(p_u_78, p_u_79)
		-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_75
		if not p_u_75.cachedInstances[p_u_79] then
			local v80 = p_u_79:GetAttribute("Collective")
			if v80 then
				v80 = p_u_75.cachedCollectives[v80]
			end
			if v80 then
				table.insert(v80, p_u_79)
			end
			p_u_75.cachedNamesToInstances[p_u_78] = p_u_79
			p_u_75.cachedInstances[p_u_79] = true
			p_u_79.Destroying:Once(function()
				-- upvalues: (ref) p_u_75, (copy) p_u_78, (copy) p_u_79
				p_u_75.cachedNamesToInstances[p_u_78] = nil
				p_u_75.cachedInstances[p_u_79] = nil
			end)
		end
	end
	local v82 = p_u_75.widget
	v_u_81("Widget", v82)
	if p_u_76 == "Widget" then
		return v82
	end
	local v_u_83 = nil
	local function v_u_89(p84)
		-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_75, (ref) v_u_12, (copy) v_u_89, (copy) v_u_81, (copy) p_u_76, (ref) v_u_83
		for _, v85 in pairs(p84:GetChildren()) do
			local v86 = v85:GetAttribute("WidgetUID")
			if not v86 or v86 == p_u_75.UID then
				local v87 = v_u_12.getRealInstance(v85) or v85
				v_u_89(v87)
				if v87:IsA("GuiBase") or (v87:IsA("UIBase") or v87:IsA("ValueBase")) then
					local v88 = v87.Name
					v_u_81(v88, v87)
					if v88 == p_u_76 then
						v_u_83 = v87
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end
	v_u_89(v82)
	return v_u_83
end
function v_u_15.getCollective(p90, p91)
	local v92 = p90.cachedCollectives[p91]
	if v92 then
		return v92
	end
	local v93 = {}
	for v94, _ in pairs(p90.cachedInstances) do
		if v94:GetAttribute("Collective") == p91 then
			table.insert(v93, v94)
		end
	end
	p90.cachedCollectives[p91] = v93
	return v93
end
function v_u_15.getInstanceOrCollective(p95, p96)
	local v97 = {}
	local v98 = p95:getInstance(p96)
	if v98 then
		table.insert(v97, v98)
	end
	if #v97 == 0 then
		v97 = p95:getCollective(p96)
	end
	return v97
end
function v_u_15.getStateGroup(p99, p100)
	local v101 = p100 or p99.activeState
	local v102 = p99.appearance[v101]
	if not v102 then
		v102 = {}
		p99.appearance[v101] = v102
	end
	return v102
end

	p109.customBehaviours[v114] = p112

		local v115 = p109:getInstanceOrCollective(p110)

			p109:refreshAppearance(v116, p111)
		end
	end
end

function v_u_15.setImage(p146, p_u_147, p148)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_2
	p146:modifyTheme({
		"IconImage",
		"Image",
		p_u_147,
		p148
	})
	task.spawn(function()
		-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_147, (ref) v_u_2
		local v149 = p_u_147
		local v150
		if tonumber(v149) then
			v150 = ("rbxassetid://%*"):format(p_u_147)
		else
			v150 = p_u_147
		end
		if v_u_2:GetAssetFetchStatus(v150) ~= Enum.AssetFetchStatus.Success then
			pcall(v_u_2.PreloadAsync, v_u_2, { v150 })
		end
	end)
	return p146
end

function v_u_15.align(p161, p162, p163)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_15
	local v164 = tostring(p162):lower()
	local v165 = (v164 == "mid" or v164 == "centre") and "center" or v164
	local v166 = v165 ~= "left" and (v165 ~= "center" and v165 ~= "right") and "left" or v165
	local v167 = v166 == "center" and v_u_15.container.TopbarCentered or v_u_15.container.TopbarStandard
	local v168 = v167.Holders
	local v169 = string.upper((string.sub(v166, 1, 1))) .. string.sub(v166, 2)
	if not p163 then
		p161.originalAlignment = v169
	end
	local v170 = p161.joinedFrame
	local v171 = v168[v169]
	p161.screenGui = v167
	p161.alignmentHolder = v171
	if not p161.isDestroyed then
		p161.widget.Parent = v170 or v171
	end
	p161.alignment = v169
	p161.alignmentChanged:Fire(v169)
	v_u_15.iconChanged:Fire(p161)
	return p161
end

function v_u_15.setTextFont(p187, p188, p189, p190, p191)

	local v193 = p190 or Enum.FontStyle.Normal
	local v194 = nil
	local v195 = typeof(p188)
	if v195 == "number" then
		v194 = Font.fromId(p188, v192, v193)
	elseif v195 == "EnumItem" then
		v194 = Font.fromEnum(p188)
	elseif v195 == "string" and not p188:match("rbxasset") then
		v194 = Font.fromName(p188, v192, v193)
	end
	p187:modifyTheme({
		"IconLabel",
		"FontFace",
		v194 or Font.new(p188, v192, v193),
		p191
	})
	return p187
end

end

	p201:_updateSelectionInstances()

	for v204, _ in pairs(p203.toggleItems) do
		local v205 = {}
		for _, v206 in pairs(v204:GetDescendants()) do
			if (v206:IsA("TextButton") or v206:IsA("ImageButton")) and v206.Active then
				table.insert(v205, v206)
			end
		end

	end
end

end

		-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_213, (copy) p_u_211

function v_u_15.convertLabelToNumberSpinner(p_u_270, p_u_271, p_u_272)
	task.defer(function()
		-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_270, (copy) p_u_271, (copy) p_u_272
		local v_u_273 = p_u_270:getInstance("IconLabel")
		v_u_273.Transparency = 1
		p_u_271.Parent = v_u_273.Parent
		p_u_271.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
		p_u_271.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		p_u_271.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, 0)
		p_u_271.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
		p_u_271.ClipsDescendants = false
		for _, v_u_274 in ipairs({
			"FontFace",
			"BorderSizePixel",
			"BorderColor3",
			"Rotation",
			"TextStrokeTransparency",
			"TextStrokeColor3",
			"TextStrokeTransparency",
			"TextColor3"
		}) do
			p_u_271[v_u_274] = v_u_273[v_u_274]
			p_u_270:addToJanitor(v_u_273:GetPropertyChangedSignal(v_u_274):Connect(function()
				-- upvalues: (ref) p_u_271, (copy) v_u_274, (copy) v_u_273
				p_u_271[v_u_274] = v_u_273[v_u_274]
			end))
		end
		local function v_u_279()
			-- upvalues: (ref) p_u_271
			local v275 = 0
			local v276 = 0
			for _, v277 in p_u_271.Frame:GetChildren() do
				local v278 = string.lower(v277.Name)
				if v278 == "digit" then
					v275 = v275 + v277.AbsoluteSize.X
					v276 = v276 + 1
				elseif (v278 == "prefix" or (v278 == "suffix" or v278 == "comma")) and v277.Text ~= "" then
					v275 = v275 + v277.AbsoluteSize.X
					v276 = v276 + 1
				end
			end
			return v275, v276
		end
		local function v_u_288()
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_279, (ref) p_u_270, (ref) p_u_271, (copy) v_u_273
			local v280, v281 = v_u_279()
			if v281 < 18 then
				p_u_270:setLabel(p_u_271.Value)
			end
			local v282 = p_u_271.Frame.AbsoluteSize.X
			while v280 < v282 and p_u_270.isDestroyed ~= true do
				task.wait(0.05)
				if v281 > 0 and v281 < 8 then
					p_u_271.TextSize = v_u_273.TextSize
					break
				end
				local v283 = p_u_271
				v283.TextSize = v283.TextSize + 1
				v282 = p_u_271.Frame.AbsoluteSize.X
				v280, v281 = v_u_279()
			end
			local v284 = v_u_273.Parent
			if v284 then
				v284 = v284.Parent
			end
			local v285
			if v284 == nil then
				v285 = 0
			elseif v284.IconImage.Visible == true then
				v285 = p_u_271.Frame.AbsoluteSize.X + v_u_273.Parent.Parent.IconImage.AbsoluteSize.X
			else
				v285 = v284.AbsoluteSize.X
			end
			while v285 < v280 and p_u_270.isDestroyed ~= true do
				task.wait(0.05)
				if v281 < 8 and v281 > 0 then
					p_u_271.TextSize = v_u_273.TextSize
					return
				end
				local v286 = p_u_271
				v286.TextSize = v286.TextSize - 1
				local v287 = v_u_273.Parent
				if v287 then
					v287 = v287.Parent
				end
				if v287 == nil then
					v285 = 0
				elseif v287.IconImage.Visible == true then
					v285 = p_u_271.Frame.AbsoluteSize.X + v_u_273.Parent.Parent.IconImage.AbsoluteSize.X
				else
					v285 = v287.AbsoluteSize.X
				end
				v280, v281 = v_u_279()
			end
		end
		p_u_270:addToJanitor(p_u_271.Frame.ChildAdded:Connect(v_u_288))
		p_u_270:addToJanitor(p_u_271.Frame.ChildRemoved:Connect(v_u_288))
		p_u_270:addToJanitor(p_u_270.iconAdded:Connect(function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_288
			task.wait(1)
			v_u_288()
		end))
		p_u_270:updateParent()
		p_u_271.Name = "LabelSpinner"
		p_u_271.Prefix = "$"
		p_u_271.Commas = true
		p_u_271.Decimals = 0
		p_u_271.Duration = 0.25
		p_u_271.Value = 10
		task.wait(0.2)
		local v289 = p_u_272
		if typeof(v289) == "function" then
			p_u_272()
		end
	end)
	return p_u_270
end
function v_u_15.destroy(p290)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_15
	if not p290.isDestroyed then
		p290:clearNotices()

		end
		p290.isDestroyed = true
		p290.janitor:clean()
		v_u_15.iconRemoved:Fire(p290)
	end
end
v_u_15.Destroy = v_u_15.destroy
return v_u_15

	["latestVersion"] = nil,
	["getLatestVersion"] = function()
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_9
		local v1 = v_u_9.latestVersion
		if v1 then
			return v1
		end

				return game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):GetProductInfo(117501901079852)
			end)

		end

		return v5

		else

		end

	end

function v_u_1.reverseTable(p15)
	local v16 = #p15 / 2
	for v17 = 1, math.floor(v16) do
		local v18 = #p15 - v17 + 1
		local v19 = p15[v18]
		local v20 = p15[v17]
		p15[v17] = v19
		p15[v18] = v20
	end

		end
	end

function v_u_1.joinFeature(p_u_122, p_u_123, p_u_124, p125)
	local v126 = p_u_122.joinJanitor
	v126:clean()
	if p125 then
		p_u_122.parentIconUID = p_u_123.UID
		p_u_122.joinedFrame = p125
		v126:add(p_u_123.alignmentChanged:Connect(function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_123, (copy) p_u_122
			local v127 = p_u_123.alignment
			p_u_122:setAlignment(v127 == "Center" and "Left" or v127, true)
		end))
		local v128 = p_u_123.alignment
		p_u_122:setAlignment(v128 == "Center" and "Left" or v128, true)
		p_u_122:modifyTheme({ "IconButton", "BackgroundTransparency", 1 }, "JoinModification")
		p_u_122:modifyTheme({ "ClickRegion", "Active", false }, "JoinModification")
		if p_u_123.childModifications then
			task.defer(function()
				-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_122, (copy) p_u_123
				p_u_122:modifyTheme(p_u_123.childModifications, p_u_123.childModificationsUID)
			end)
		end
		local v_u_129 = p_u_122:getInstance("ClickRegion")
		local function v130()
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_129, (copy) p_u_123
			v_u_129.Selectable = p_u_123.isSelected
		end
		v126:add(p_u_123.toggled:Connect(v130))
		task.defer(v130)
		v126:add(function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_129
			v_u_129.Selectable = true
		end)
		local v_u_131 = p_u_122.UID
		table.insert(p_u_124, v_u_131)
		p_u_123:autoDeselect(false)
		p_u_123.childIconsDict[v_u_131] = true
		if not p_u_123.isEnabled then
			p_u_123:setEnabled(true)
		end
		p_u_122.joinedParent:Fire(p_u_123)
		v126:add(function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_122, (copy) p_u_124, (copy) v_u_131, (copy) p_u_123
			if not p_u_122.joinedFrame then
				return
			end
			for v132, v133 in pairs(p_u_124) do
				if v133 == v_u_131 then
					table.remove(p_u_124, v132)
					break
				end
			end
			local v134 = require(p_u_122.iconModule).getIconByUID(p_u_122.parentIconUID)
			if v134 then
				p_u_122:setAlignment(p_u_122.originalAlignment)
				p_u_122.parentIconUID = false
				p_u_122.joinedFrame = false
				p_u_122:removeModification("JoinModification")
				local v135 = true
				local v136 = v134.childIconsDict
				v136[v_u_131] = nil
				for _, _ in pairs(v136) do
					v135 = false
					break
				end
				if v135 and not v134.isAnOverflow then
					v134:setEnabled(false)
				end
				local v137 = p_u_123.alignment
				p_u_122:setAlignment(v137 == "Center" and "Left" or v137, true)
			end
		end)
	else
		p_u_122:leave()
	end
end

		elseif v_u_4.Visible then

		end
		p_u_1:modifyTheme({ "Indicator", "Visible", p13 })
		p_u_1.updateSize:Fire()
	end
	p_u_1.janitor:add(v_u_7:GetPropertyChangedSignal("GamepadCursorEnabled"):Connect(v_u_14))
	p_u_1.indicatorSet:Connect(function(p15)
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_10, (copy) v_u_12, (copy) v_u_14
		local v16
		if p15 then
			v_u_10.Image = v_u_12:GetImageForKeyCode(p15)
			v16 = true
		else
			v16 = false
		end
		v_u_14(v16)
	end)
	v_u_2:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function()
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_4
		local v17 = v_u_2.AbsoluteSize.Y * 0.96

	end)
	local v18 = v_u_2.AbsoluteSize.Y * 0.96
	v_u_4.Size = UDim2.new(0, v18, 0, v18)
	return v_u_4

					return p29[2] < p30[2]
				end)

				for v32 = 1, v25 do

				end
				v_u_2:SetAttribute("MenuWidth", v31)
			end))

		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_5, (copy) p_u_2, (copy) p_u_1, (copy) v_u_10, (copy) v_u_3
		if p11 then
			local v12 = p11 > 99
			v_u_5.Text = v12 and "99+" or p11
			if v12 then
				v_u_5.TextSize = 11
			end

			local v14 = p_u_2.getIconByUID(p_u_1.parentIconUID)

			if p_u_1.isSelected and v15 then
				v13 = false
			elseif v14 and not v14.isSelected then
				v13 = false
			end
			v_u_10.setVisible(v_u_3, v13, "NoticeHandler")
		end
	end)

		-- upvalues: (copy) p_u_1, (copy) p_u_2, (copy) v_u_8, (copy) v_u_9, (copy) v_u_10

		end

		local v_u_21 = v_u_20:add(v_u_9.new())
		v_u_20:add(p_u_1.endNotices:Connect(function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_21

		end))

			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_21
			v_u_21:Fire()
		end))

			["completeSignal"] = v_u_21,
			["clearNoticeEvent"] = v18
		}

		v23.totalNotices = v23.totalNotices + 1
		p_u_1.noticeChanged:Fire(p_u_1.totalNotices)
		v_u_21:Once(function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_20, (ref) p_u_1, (ref) v_u_22
			v_u_20:destroy()

			p_u_1.notices[v_u_22] = nil

local function v_u_101(p99)

end

function v_u_78.OnStart(_)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_77, (copy) v_u_17, (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_143, (copy) v_u_161, (copy) v_u_168, (copy) v_u_203, (ref) v_u_39, (copy) v_u_13, (copy) v_u_147, (copy) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_29, (copy) v_u_48, (copy) v_u_47, (ref) v_u_46, (copy) v_u_131, (copy) v_u_132
	v_u_77()
	v_u_17:InitiateProximityCulling()
	v_u_5.tree_spawn.listen(v_u_143)
	v_u_5.tree_despawn.listen(v_u_161)
	v_u_5.tree_mutation.listen(v_u_168)
	v_u_5.tree_lumberjack_update.listen(v_u_203)
	v_u_39 = v_u_13:RegisterTask("Loading trees...", 0)
	v_u_5.request_tree_snapshot.listen(v_u_147)
	v_u_5.request_tree_snapshot.send()
	local v_u_204 = 0
	v_u_4.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
		-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_29, (ref) v_u_48, (ref) v_u_47, (ref) v_u_46, (ref) v_u_131, (ref) v_u_204, (ref) v_u_132
		v_u_29.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(v_u_48.X + v_u_47.X, v_u_48.Y + v_u_47.Y)
		local v205 = os.clock()
		if v_u_46 <= v205 then
			v_u_46 = v205 + 0.3
			v_u_131()
		end
		if v_u_204 <= v205 then
			v_u_204 = v205 + 0.5
			for v206, v207 in v_u_132 do
				if v206.Parent then
					for _, v208 in v207 do
						if v208.CanCollide then
							v208.CanCollide = false
						end
					end
				else
					v_u_132[v206] = nil
				end
			end
		end
	end)
end
return v_u_78

local function v_u_16(p7)

end
local function v_u_25(p17, p18)

	end

end
return {
	["Play"] = function(p26, p27, p28, p29, p30)

		v_u_5.planting:Play()

		local v32 = v_u_3[p29]
		local v33

			local v34 = v_u_3.getRandomSpecies(p29, p30)
			local v35 = v32.species
			if v35 then
				v35 = v32.species[v34]
			end

				local v36 = v35.image

			else

			end
		else
			v33 = nil
		end

			if #v31 <= 1 then
				task.spawn(p26._playSimple, p26, p27, v33)
			else
				task.spawn(p26._playSpin, p26, p27, v31, v33, p30)
			end
		else
			return
		end
	end,
	["_playSimple"] = function(_, p37, p38)

		if v_u_39 then

local function v_u_35(p22, p23)
	local v24 = p22.Size * 0.5
	local v25 = p22.Position
	local v26 = p23.X - v25.X
	local v27 = math.abs(v26) - v24.X
	local v28 = math.max(v27, 0)
	local v29 = p23.Y - v25.Y
	local v30 = math.abs(v29) - v24.Y
	local v31 = math.max(v30, 0)
	local v32 = p23.Z - v25.Z
	local v33 = math.abs(v32) - v24.Z
	local v34 = math.max(v33, 0)
	return v28 * v28 + v31 * v31 + v34 * v34
end
local function v_u_41(p36, p37, p38)
	local v39 = typeof(p36)
	local v40 = typeof(p37)
	if v39 == "number" and v40 == "number" then
		return p36 + (p37 - p36) * p38
	end
	if v39 == "Color3" and v40 == "Color3" then
		return p36:Lerp(p37, p38)
	end
	if v39 == "Vector3" and v40 == "Vector3" then
		return p36:Lerp(p37, p38)
	end
	if p38 >= 0.5 then
		p36 = p37 or p36
	end
	return p36
end

			end

	end

function v20.ApplySort(_, p69)

		table.insert(v70, {
			["id"] = v71,
			["data"] = v72
		})
	end

		table.sort(v70, function(p73, p74)
			return p73.data.rate > p74.data.rate
		end)
	elseif p69 == "rarity" then
		table.sort(v70, function(p75, p76)
			if p75.data.treeTemplateIndex == p76.data.treeTemplateIndex then
				return p75.data.speciesRarity < p76.data.speciesRarity
			else
				return p75.data.treeTemplateIndex > p76.data.treeTemplateIndex
			end
		end)
	else
		table.sort(v70, function(p77, p78)
			return p77.data.index > p78.data.index
		end)
	end
	local v79 = v_u_10:Get(v_u_12) or {}
	for v85, v81 in v70 do
		local v82 = false
		for v83 = 2, v_u_13 do
			if v79[v83] == v81.id then
				v82 = true
				break
			end
		end
		local v84 = v81.data.ui
		if v82 then
			local v85 = v85 - 10000
		end
		v84.LayoutOrder = v85
	end
end

		return

		end

		p54.IsComplete = true
		p54.CompletedEvent:Fire()
	end

local function v_u_92(p67)

		return
	end

	if not (v69 and v69._key) then
		return
	end
	v_u_66(v69)
	local v70 = workspace:GetServerTimeNow()
	local v71 = math.floor(v70)
	local v72 = v_u_23
	local v73 = (p67 - 1) / math.max(v72, 1) * v_u_22
	local v74 = (v71 - math.floor(v73)) / v_u_22

		if v69._slot ~= nil then
			return
		end

		table.clear(v69._appliedPurchased)

		local v79 = v_u_7[v78]

			local v82 = v79.maxStock - v79.minStock + 1
			local v83 = v79.minStock
			local v84 = v81 * v82
			v80 = v83 + math.floor(v84)
		else
			v80 = 0
		end

		local v86 = v76 and (v76[v78] or 0) or 0

function v_u_43.DoesMarketDataExist(_, p177)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_42
	local v178 = v_u_42[p177]
	if v178 and (v178._hasData ~= true and v178._key ~= nil) then
		return (v178._nextRestock or 0) > workspace:GetServerTimeNow()
	else
		return false
	end

	end

local function v_u_122(p119)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_25, (copy) v_u_27, (copy) v_u_26, (copy) v_u_118, (ref) v_u_33, (copy) v_u_32, (copy) v_u_15, (copy) v_u_42

		v_u_26.Visible = false
		return
	end

		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_1, (copy) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_5

			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_4
			if not p7.TextSource then

			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_2, (ref) v_u_5, (copy) p_u_6

					v12 = v10

							v12 = v_u_5:NextInteger(1, v11)
						end

				end
				v10 = v12
			end
		end)
	end,
	["SendSystemMessage"] = function(_, p13, p14)
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_3
		local v15 = v_u_3
		local v16

		else

		end

				return
			end

					return
				end
				v_u_6:PromptConfirmation(("Buy a Basic ATV Crate for %*?"):format((v_u_9.formatNumber(50000, true, true))), true, function()
					-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_7
					v_u_7.buy_basic_crate.send()
				end)
			end
		end
		return
	end
end

>>> SOURCE: StarterPlayer.StarterPlayerScripts.Controllers.VehicleController.LocalVehicleGui
local v1 = game:GetService("Players")
local v_u_2 = game:GetService("RunService")
local v_u_3 = game:GetService("Workspace")
local v_u_4 = game:GetService("UserInputService")
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v_u_5 = script:WaitForChild("VehicleGui")
local v_u_6 = v1.LocalPlayer
local v7 = v_u_6.PlayerScripts:WaitForChild("PlayerModule")
local v_u_8 = require(v7:WaitForChild("ControlModule"))
local v_u_9 = {}
v_u_9.__index = v_u_9
function v_u_9.new(p10)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_9, (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_5
	local v11 = v_u_9
	local v12 = setmetatable({}, v11)
	v12.connections = {}
	v12.car = p10
	v12.localSeatModule = require(script.Parent.LocalVehicleSeating)
	v12.chassis = p10:WaitForChild("Chassis")
	v12.seat = v12.chassis:WaitForChild("VehicleSeat")
	local v13 = v_u_6:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
	v12.gui = v_u_5:Clone()
	v12.gui.Name = "ActiveVehicleGui"
	v12.gui.ResetOnSpawn = false
	v12.gui.Parent = v13
	v12.touchFrame = v12.gui:WaitForChild("TouchControlFrame")
	v12.accelButton = v12.touchFrame:WaitForChild("AccelerateButton")
	v12.brakeButton = v12.touchFrame:WaitForChild("BrakeButton")
	v12.exitButton = v12.touchFrame:WaitForChild("ExitButton")
	v12.touchEnabled = false
	v12.driverControlsEnabled = false
	v12.throttleInput = 0
	v12.steeringInput = 0
	v12._accelDown = false
	v12._brakeDown = false
	return v12
end
function v_u_9._connect(p14, p15, p16)
	p14.connections[#p14.connections + 1] = p15:Connect(p16)
end
function v_u_9._updateThrottle(p17)
	if p17._accelDown and p17._brakeDown or not (p17._accelDown or p17._brakeDown) then
		p17.throttleInput = 0
		return
	elseif p17._accelDown then
		p17.throttleInput = 1
	else
		p17.throttleInput = -1
	end
end
function v_u_9._setButtonPressed(_, p18, p19)
	p18.ImageTransparency = p19 and 1 or 0
	p18.Pressed.ImageTransparency = p19 and 0 or 1
end
function v_u_9._applyInputType(p20, p21)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_6
	if p21 == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
		if not p20.touchEnabled then
			p20.touchEnabled = true
			local v22 = v_u_6.Character
			if v22 then
				v22 = v22:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
			end
			if v22 then
				v22.UseJumpPower = true
				v22.JumpPower = 0
			end
		end
		if p20.driverControlsEnabled then
			p20.accelButton.Visible = true
			p20.brakeButton.Visible = true
		end
		p20.exitButton.Size = UDim2.new(0, 44, 0, 44)
	else
		if p20.touchEnabled then
			p20.touchEnabled = false
			local v23 = v_u_6.Character
			if v23 then
				v23 = v23:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
			end
			if v23 then
				v23.JumpPower = 50
				v23.UseJumpPower = false
			end
			p20._accelDown = false
			p20._brakeDown = false
			p20.throttleInput = 0
			p20:_setButtonPressed(p20.accelButton, false)
			p20:_setButtonPressed(p20.brakeButton, false)
		end
		p20.accelButton.Visible = false
		p20.brakeButton.Visible = false
		p20.exitButton.Size = UDim2.new(0, 72, 0, 72)
	end
	p20.exitButton.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, 1)
	p20.exitButton.Position = UDim2.new(1, -24, 1, -(20 + p20.accelButton.Size.Y.Offset + 20))
end

	end

local function v_u_47(p_u_33, p34)

			v38:Destroy()

local function v_u_63()

	end

>>> SOURCE: StarterPlayer.StarterPlayerScripts.Controllers.FreeSaplingController

local v_u_10 = {
	[0] = {
		["template"] = "FreeOakSapling",
		["wait"] = 150,

	},

		["template"] = "FreeJumboSapling",
		["wait"] = 60,
		["promptAction"] = "Claim"
	}
}
local v_u_11 = v1.LocalPlayer
local v_u_12 = nil
local v_u_13 = 0
local v_u_14 = os.clock()
local v_u_15 = false
local v_u_16 = false

local function v_u_47(p18, p19)
	-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_12, (copy) v_u_10, (copy) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_9, (ref) v_u_15, (ref) v_u_14, (copy) v_u_11, (ref) v_u_16, (copy) v_u_7, (copy) v_u_4

		v_u_12:Destroy()
		v_u_12 = nil
	end
	local v_u_20 = v_u_10[p19]
	if v_u_20 then
		local v21 = p18:FindFirstChild("Spawn")
		if v21 and v21:IsA("BasePart") then

			if v22 then

				v_u_23:PivotTo(v21.CFrame * v_u_9)

							end

							-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_12, (copy) v_u_23, (ref) v_u_15, (ref) v_u_14, (copy) v_u_20, (ref) v_u_27

								if v30 <= 0 then

										v_u_27.Text = "Ready to claim!"

									end
									break
								end

										v33 = v33 + 1
										v35 = 0
									end

									if v33 > 0 then
										v36 = string.format("%dm %ds", v33, v35)
									else
										v36 = string.format("%ds", v35)
									end
									v31.Text = v36
								end

							end
						end)

							-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_11, (ref) v_u_15, (ref) v_u_16, (ref) v_u_14, (copy) v_u_20, (ref) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_4

		else
			return
		end

		return
	end
end
local function v_u_57(p48)
	-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_16, (ref) v_u_13, (ref) v_u_14, (copy) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_17, (copy) v_u_47, (ref) v_u_15, (ref) v_u_12
	v_u_16 = false
	if p48.success then
		if v_u_13 == 0 then
			v_u_13 = 1
			v_u_14 = os.clock()
			v_u_7:Notify("You claimed a free Oak Sapling!", "green")
			if v_u_17 then
				v_u_47(v_u_17, 1)
				return
			end
		elseif v_u_13 == 1 then
			v_u_15 = true
			v_u_7:Notify("You claimed a free Jumbo Oak Sapling!", "green")
			v_u_7:Announce("Find more saplings in zone shops!", nil, 6)
			if v_u_12 then
				v_u_12:Destroy()
				v_u_12 = nil
				return
			end
		end
	else
		if p48.remaining and p48.remaining > 0 then
			local v49 = v_u_7
			local v50 = "Wait "
			local v51 = p48.remaining
			local v52 = v51 / 60
			local v53 = math.floor(v52)
			local v54 = v51 % 60
			local v55 = math.ceil(v54)
			if v55 == 60 then
				v53 = v53 + 1
				v55 = 0
			end
			local v56
			if v53 > 0 then
				v56 = string.format("%dm %ds", v53, v55)
			else
				v56 = string.format("%ds", v55)
			end
			v49:Notify(v50 .. v56 .. " before claiming your free sapling!", "red")
			return
		end
		v_u_7:Notify("You\'ve already claimed your free saplings!", "red")
		v_u_15 = true
		if v_u_12 then
			v_u_12:Destroy()
			v_u_12 = nil
		end
	end
end
return {
	["OnStart"] = function(_)
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_5, (copy) v_u_8, (ref) v_u_15, (ref) v_u_13, (ref) v_u_14, (copy) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_57, (ref) v_u_12, (copy) v_u_6, (ref) v_u_17, (copy) v_u_47
		v_u_5:EnsureData()
		local v58 = v_u_5:Get(v_u_8) or 0
		local v59 = typeof(v58) ~= "number" and 0 or v58
		if v59 >= 2 then
			v_u_15 = true
		else
			v_u_13 = v59
			if v_u_13 == 1 then
				v_u_14 = os.clock()
			end
			v_u_4.free_sapling_result.listen(v_u_57)
			v_u_5.DataUpdated:Connect(function(p60, p61)
				-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_8, (ref) v_u_15, (ref) v_u_12
				if p60 == v_u_8 and p61 == 2 then
					v_u_15 = true
					if v_u_12 then
						v_u_12:Destroy()
						v_u_12 = nil
					end
				end
			end)
			local v62 = v_u_6:GetLocalPlot()
			if v62 then
				v_u_17 = v62
				v_u_47(v62, v_u_13)
			end
		end
	end
}

>>> SOURCE: StarterPlayer.StarterPlayerScripts.Controllers.EffectsController
local v1 = {}
local v_u_2 = game:GetService("CollectionService")
local v_u_3 = game:GetService("RunService")
function v1.OnStart(_)
	-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_2, (copy) v_u_3
	local v_u_4 = {}
	local function v6(p5)
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_4
		if not v_u_4[p5] then
			v_u_4[p5] = math.random()
		end
	end
	local function v8(p7)
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_4
		v_u_4[p7] = nil
	end
	for _, v9 in v_u_2:GetTagged("Rainbow") do
		if not v_u_4[v9] then
			v_u_4[v9] = math.random()
		end
	end
	v_u_2:GetInstanceAddedSignal("Rainbow"):Connect(v6)
	v_u_2:GetInstanceRemovedSignal("Rainbow"):Connect(v8)
	v_u_3.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
		-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_4
		for v10, v11 in v_u_4 do
			local v12 = (os.clock() * 1 + v11) % 1
			v10.FillColor = Color3.fromHSV(v12, 1, 1)
		end
	end)
end
return v1

>>> SOURCE: Players.ryuxpdl.PlayerGui.HUD.Left.StarterPack.LocalScript
local v1 = game:GetService("Players")
local v2 = game:GetService("RunService")
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local v3 = v1.LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts
local v_u_4 = require(v3.Controllers.DataController)
local v5 = require(v3.Controllers.UIController)
local v_u_6 = require(v3.Components.PurchasePrompt)
local v_u_7 = script.Parent
local v_u_8 = v_u_7.Icon
local v_u_9 = v_u_7.Timer
local v_u_10 = v_u_6.RobuxPurchases.Passes.starter_pack.id
local v_u_11 = tostring(v_u_10)
v_u_4:EnsureData()
local v_u_12 = nil
local v_u_13 = nil
local v14 = v_u_4:Get("diagnostics")
local v_u_15 = v14 and v14.playTime or 0
if v_u_15 < 600 then
	local v16 = v_u_4:Get("purchaseLog")
	local v17 = v16
	if v17 then
		v17 = v16.passes
	end
	if v17 then
		v17 = v17[v_u_11] ~= nil
	end
	if not v17 then
		v_u_7.Visible = v_u_15 >= 300
		if v_u_7.Visible then
			local v18 = 600 - v_u_15
			local v19 = v18 < 0 and 0 or v18
			local v20 = math.floor(v19)
			local v21 = math.max(0, v20)
			local v22 = v21 / 60
			local v23 = math.floor(v22)
			v_u_9.Text = ("%*m %*s"):format(v23, v21 - v23 * 60)
		end
		v5:CreateButton(v_u_7, function()
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_6, (copy) v_u_10
			v_u_6.prompt(v_u_10, "Game Pass")
		end)
		v_u_13 = v_u_4.DataUpdated:Connect(function(p24, p25)
			-- upvalues: (copy) v_u_11, (copy) v_u_7, (ref) v_u_12, (ref) v_u_13
			if p24 == "purchaseLog" then
				if p25 then
					p25 = p25.passes
				end
				if p25 and p25[v_u_11] ~= nil then
					v_u_7.Visible = false
					if v_u_12 then
						v_u_12:Disconnect()
						v_u_12 = nil
					end
					if v_u_13 then
						v_u_13:Disconnect()
						v_u_13 = nil
					end
				end
			end
		end)
		local v_u_26 = os.clock()
		local v_u_27 = 0
		v_u_12 = v2.Heartbeat:Connect(function(p28)
			-- upvalues: (ref) v_u_15, (ref) v_u_27, (copy) v_u_7, (copy) v_u_26, (copy) v_u_8, (copy) v_u_4, (copy) v_u_9, (ref) v_u_12, (ref) v_u_13
			v_u_15 = v_u_15 + p28
			v_u_27 = v_u_27 + p28
			if v_u_7.Visible then
				local v29 = (os.clock() - v_u_26) % 3
				if v29 < 1 then
					local v30 = v_u_8
					local v31 = v29 * 6.283185307179586 * 2
					v30.Rotation = math.sin(v31) * 15
				else
					v_u_8.Rotation = 0
				end
			end
			if v_u_27 >= 1 then
				v_u_27 = v_u_27 - 1
				local v32 = v_u_4:Get("diagnostics")
				local v33 = v32 and v32.playTime or 0
				if v_u_15 < v33 then
					v_u_15 = v33
				end
				if not v_u_7.Visible and v_u_15 >= 300 then
					v_u_7.Visible = true
				end
				if v_u_7.Visible then
					local v34 = 600 - v_u_15
					local v35 = v34 < 0 and 0 or v34
					local v36 = v_u_9
					local v37 = math.floor(v35)
					local v38 = math.max(0, v37)
					local v39 = v38 / 60
					local v40 = math.floor(v39)
					v36.Text = ("%*m %*s"):format(v40, v38 - v40 * 60)
					if v35 <= 0 then
						v_u_7.Visible = false
						if v_u_12 then
							v_u_12:Disconnect()
							v_u_12 = nil
						end
						if v_u_13 then
							v_u_13:Disconnect()
							v_u_13 = nil
						end
					end
				end
			end
		end)
		return
	end
end
v_u_7.Visible = false
if v_u_12 then
	v_u_12:Disconnect()
	v_u_12 = nil
end
if v_u_13 then
	v_u_13:Disconnect()
	v_u_13 = nil
end
